Besides, it’s not your problem if Space Truthers believe what you’re doing or not.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r2bb)[(replace: ?r2ba)[](replace:?display)[You decide you’ll just leave the room the next time you want to pick your nose. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship2C)]] |ship2C)[For security? Whose security? Surely they can’t mean my own. For better or for worse, you feel untouchable in the empty blackness of space. You know that even if you do respond, the article will have been published long ago.<br> [Irked, you read the article...]<r2ca|<br> [You read the article and, to your surprise, enjoy it quite a lot.]<r2cb|<br> [Don’t bother opening the article.]<r2cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2ca)[(replace: ?r2cb)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You notice the “few details changed”. You can’t help but feel the need to correct it…<br> You turn on the video recorder in the main cabin. Your frustration is visible in the way you hold your face in your hands, rubbing at your temples and cheeks. <br> “Controls, that’s great that Astronomy is doing an article or whatever, but it isn’t right. I understand that ultimately everything is for the image of Celestial Streams….and my autonomy is not really a factor in the publicity. But to claim that I said “*I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the acco*m*modations provided by Celestial Streams!*” is such obvious bullshit I have to say something…what is the point of lying to people about my happiness?”<br> You could go on, but you know it won’t matter to Celestial Streams. Your only hope is that it lands on sympathetic ears at Mission Controls.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r2cb)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You especially enjoy the lengthy discussion of your academic accolades. You feel pride reading through the list, knowing that your journey on the Astral Kite is a final homage to a cherished career. You stand up and look out the large cabin windows into darkness marked with distant stars. As you stare out, your pride gives way to a sort of emptiness. You think back to your fabricated quote in the article, “I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the accommodations provided by Celestial Streams!”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r2cc)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cb)[](replace:?display)[If it helps whoever feel more secure for whatever reason on Earth, then so be it. You’re out here now. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3A)]] |ship3A)[You feel conflicted upon reading this message...<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more funding for research…]<r3a|<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more power over university funding…]<r3b|<br> [Academic Corporations like Celestial Streams are gaining too much power over US science…]<r3c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r3a)[(replace: ?r3b)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means furthering humanity’s knowledge of space. This goal has been a constant in your life, something that’s provided you ambition, determination, and wonder. It’s nice that you can inspire others to pursue the same path as you, even if there is risk to the Scholars Draft. While it is in some ways a shame that academia can no longer exist without the Scholars Draft, you see it as a necessity. The world has been driven to profitization, and there was no way around that. Better for research to exist as it does now than not at all.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r3b)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means more Scholars Drafts. In fact, if Celestial Streams gets more funding, then they could construct further missions like yours, or other long-term and dangerous missions on Earth. You feel queasy at the idea of inspiring young students to follow in your footsteps. Your mission was the first of this duration and hazard — most draft assignments were typically 1-2 years, and in another country other than one’s own, at most. If Celestial Streams gets more funding, will more people be subjected to spending the rest of their lives, alone, on a spaceship?<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r3c)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3b)[](replace:?display)[More funding to Celestial Streams and other Academic Corporations means that their monopoly over U.S. science funding will only grow. The number of Scholars Draftees could increase with more funding to create more Scholar Drafts programs, making tenured positions more and more precarious, leading to a shut-out of academic culture entirely. The more people who fear the draft, the less scholars, the more likely scholars are to be selected, and the cycle will continue until there are no longer any scholars left. It’s almost like this was purposefully devised, but you can’t be certain. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3B)]] |ship3B)[You lean back in your seat as you finish reading this message. Your physical body feels okay. The workout room is substantial and there’s not much else to do anyway. There’s even a rock wall installed. As far as feelings go…you struggle to find the appropriate descriptors. It’s been a little while since you’ve been asked to express your emotions to someone else. *Maybe I should get into journaling…*you swivel in your chair and look out the windows into space. It looks so empty, and of course it is exceptionally so, with the majority of the Universe being comprised of, well, nothing. It’s funny to think of how abundant your own planet seems within the empty Universe. Brimming with life, all the colors of the rainbow, all the emotions of humanity and the strife of man wrapped up into something that weighs ~ 300,000x less than the lighter Main Sequence stars you’ve seen on your journey thus far. And yet, even in abundance, surrounded by green, blue, light, water, wind…there is a universality to the human desire for there to be something more than just our planet. *I suppose that’s what I’m doing out here.*<br> You turn back around to the computer screen and scroll to see the survey selections:<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of loneliness: (dropdown: bind $loneliness, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br> On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of impending doom: (dropdown: bind $doom, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br>] *Damn, okay then…*<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a weekly basis, how often do you think about opening the airlock and just ending it all?]<br> You sigh and close out of the tab. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3C")[ (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4A)]] |ship4A)[You wonder for a moment who, or what organization, challenged the Scholars Draft. Maybe they will attempt to get in touch with you someday. You feel entertained by the thought of someone new reaching out. Something to add some excitement to your little world, growing smaller every day.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4B)]] |ship4B)[You click through the endless messages of smiling stick figures and beaming stars. <br> <img src="renders/astralkite-alien.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> <img src="renders/astralkite-spaceman.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> You decide to send a drawing of your own and a message back to the “kids”. You do the math and realize that by the time this message arrives, they’ll be approximately (print: (round: $di*2*100)/100) years older. Woof. You get out the art supplies stocked by Mission Controls and find the optical paints supplied by Controls and do your best to think of something to cheery to say…you know, for the kids or whatever. <br> To finish off your letter, you add a drawing. <br> You draw:<br> (dropdown: bind $drawing, "a star", "an astronaut", "an alien")<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4C)]] |ship4C)[(set: $music to (prompt: "What is your favorite genre of music?", "")) (set: $food to (prompt: "What is your favorite food?", "")) (set: $regrets to (prompt: "And, lastly, do you have any regrets about embarking on this voyage?", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship5A)]] |ship5A)[[Hi controls, I don’t feel comfortable with that...]<r5a|<br> [Of course, I’d be happy to.]<r5b|<br> [Send back a recording of you playing John Lennon's "Imagine"]<r5c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5a)[(replace: ?r5b)[](replace: ?r5c)[](replace:?display)["You haven’t explained what the “activism” entails…and what exactly do you mean by “anti-American”?”"<br> You wish you could ask someone other than Celestial Streams.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] serenity of oneness that outer space has imbued you with. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r5c)[(replace: ?r5a)[](replace: ?r5b)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5B")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship5B)]] |ship5B)[[//Over one thousand space flights?!//]<r5ba|<br> [That’s wonderful. I’d like to send a gift to SpaceZ, for naming a ship of theirs after me.]<r5bb|<br> [Walk away.]<r5bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ba)[(replace: ?r5bb)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[*A company like SpaceZ can’t just use my name like that without permission…right? I don’t WANT to be associated with the commercialization of space, I don’t want to be the face of massive CO2 dumps…is this even legal?* Then again, what legal protections do you have (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home anyway? What legal protections can you grant the Earth from so far away?<br> You send back a message to Celestial Streams, “I don’t approve of this. I don’t approve of you using my face and name for this work. None of this was my choice you just put me here and now I have to be your political pawn too?”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r5bb)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[Select the gift you’d like to send:<br> (dropdown: bind $gift2spacez, "A mosaic of the space-sky, as seen from the hull of the spacecraft. ", "A picture of the spectroscopic image of the solar system, as viewed from the spacecraft.", "a picture of yourself to use on the SpaceZ website") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r5bc)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bb)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Space commercialization? Giant rockets injecting the atmosphere with a bunch of crazy shit? It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship5C)]] |ship5C)[Would you like to respond to this message?<br> [Yes]<r5ca|<br> [No]<r5cb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ca)[(replace: ?r5cb)[](replace:?display)[ [What the hell? I didn’t sign up for this.]<r5caa|<br> [This is insane. I have to say something.]<r5cab|<br> [Huh, that’s cool I guess. ]<r5cac|<br> (click: ?r5caa)[(replace: ?r5cab)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[//Not that I signed up for any of this…but seriously? A f%^&* missile?//<br> You decide to send a photocopy of your ass along with the text “Fuck your missiles”. There are no repercussions out here.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r5cab)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[You don’t know if the message will be worthwhile to Earth by the time it gets there, but you have to speak out.<br> You turn on video software on the computer and look into the camera. “Citizens of the Earth, hello from (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home. It has come to my attention that our propensity for violence has reached the far stretches of our Solar System — out to the Asteroid Belt. I implore those nations in the Outer Space Treaty to uphold their fellow human to the standards of peace and unity that the Treaty stands for. I am calling for the nations responsible to cease weapons testing on the Asteroid Belt”.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r5cac)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cab)[](replace:?display)[“I’m glad my name lives on in this way…I am proud of our accomplishments, controls.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ]] (click: ?r5cb)[(replace: ?r5ca)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Maybe you’ll find a new book to read. It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6A)]] |ship6A)[[Planting the US flag into a globe? Ew…]<r6a|<br> [Good for them, I guess.]<r6b|<br> [Awesome! I always knew people would build statues of me some day.]<r6c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6a)[(replace: ?r6b)[](replace: ?r6c)[](replace:?display)[I’m not comfortable having my face and name attached to something that looks like it’s claiming US superiority over the world. That’s kind of gross. I know it’ll be a while before this message gets back to you, but please change that statue.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6b)[(replace: ?r6a)[](replace: ?r6c)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6c)[(replace: ?r6a)[](replace: ?r6b)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6B")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6B)]] |ship6B)[You go to the video camera application of your Controls Center, but are hesitant to begin recording. *Turn around?* No… *Go back to Earth and pick up a friend for the ride? Or maybe… go back to Earth and stay put?* <br> You do what you usually end up doing before sending a message to whoever they ask you to send a message to, which is stare off into (literal) space. You swivel around in your chair a few times. You remember Dr. $b6_dr from graduate school. $b6_pro1 was your dear friend, back when instantaneous communication was an option for you. And now $b6_pro3 has been launched into space, just like you. You can’t help but feel simultaneously abandoned and like you’re abandoning Dr. $b6_dr, like it’s your fault been $b6_pro3 was extricated from society and plunged into isolation. <br> *Why’d they put us here on our own anyway? How the fuck does that make any sense?* <br> You look back into your mind to the days you were training for the mission. Or, at least you try. Pacing the halls of the ship and spending your days staring into blackness has done strange things to your memories. The lights in the ship go on and off with your circadian rhythm, specially measured to your personal waking/sleeping cycle, but without the roll of the sun in the sky, the changing lights quickly lost their potency. You remember less and less of your days spent training. Sometimes in moments of particular slipperiness you wonder if they happened at all. <br> You can’t help but feel like a show animal, shipped off to space for the humanity to have its yucks. And now it’s happening to your friend too.<br> [Compose yourself and send a message.]<r6ba|<br> [Send a message, who care's if you're a mess?]<r6bb|<br> [Toast your friend.]<r6bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ba)[(replace: ?r6bb)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[ou compose yourself and record a cheery message to your friend, wishing them well. You even manage to include an inside joke from graduate school. Something about a loaf of banana bread. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6bb)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[You begin to cry as soon as you hit record. “Dr. $b6_dr, I hope the mission treats you well.”, you conclude in the recording. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6bc)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bb)[](replace:?display)[You grab a glass and your favorite liquor. You hit record, pour, and toast. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6C")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6C)]] |ship6C)[[Not my problem.]<r6ca|<br> [Stir the pot.]<r6cb|<br> [Stand up for the Space Conservationists.]<r6cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ca)[(replace: ?r6cb)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6cb)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Lately, updates on the how-goings of Earth have felt more and more like a game to you. Why not stir the pot more?<br> Send one of the below messages:<br> (dropdown: bind $stirthepot, "“Actually, Celestial Streams, I think the Outer Space Treaty is bullshit. Bye!”", "“FUCK YOU, space miners!!!! Fuck you and your greed!!!!!!!”", "“Whoever sent this message, I’ll see to it personally that you’re fired immediately.” You can’t really do anything, but the thought of Celestial Streams receiving this message still makes you laugh. What’s the harm in a little prank call to Earth from " + (string: (round: $di*100)/100) + " light years away?") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r6cc)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cb)[](replace:?display)[The Outer Space Treaty of 1967 explicitly prohibited ownership of space objects, which includes mining them for resources. You’re not impressed, but not particularly surprised either. You send back a message.<br> “I stand with the Space Conservationists, who uphold the ideology that space can not be owned by human or entity, but is a thing for us to cherish and appreciate, as the last thing untouched by humanity’s greed. I ask the nations of the world to consider withdrawing from all extraterrestrial mining activities.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6D")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship6D)]] |ship6D)[[Reply]<r6d1|<br> [Don't reply]<r6d2|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6d1)[(replace: ?r6d2)[](replace:?display)[ [Thanks for the update!]<r6d1a|<br> [Who cares?]<r6d1b|<br> []<disp1| (click: ?r6d1a)[(replace: ?r6d1b)[](replace:?display)[I look forward to continuing this mission under the guidance of SpaceZ.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]] (click: ?r6d1b)[(replace: ?r6d1a)[](replace:?display)[Celestial Streams, SpaceZ, it doesn’t matter. I’m done replying to these messages. You’re all too far away for anything I say to make a difference.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]] ] ] (click: ?r6d2)[(replace: ?r6d1)[](replace:?display)[What would be the point? SpaceZ had nothing to do with your mission, and they’re an even more exploitative academic corporation than Celestial Streams is. No, you don’t think it’s worth replying anymore.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "7A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship7A)]] |ship7A)[[Send no reply.]<r7a|<br> [“Comms, I mean Alex I suppose…”]<r7b|<br> [Turn off the communications equipment.]<r7c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r7a)[(replace: ?r7b)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r7b)[(replace: ?r7a)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[“Where are you? What’s going on? Why would they cut Celestial Streams funding?”<br> You send the message and check the monitor. (print: (round: $di*100)/100) years until message is received.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r7c)[(replace: ?r7a)[](replace: ?r7b)[](replace:?display)[You cut the monitor off. You’d rather not hear from comms anyway. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "7B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship7B)]] |ship7B)[Changing landscape? What the hell is that supposed to mean? You wished now more than ever you were an astronaut on the ISS peering down at the Earth rather than out deep, deep in space. If Mission Controls is moving inland, then do they mean the coast is changing? Is the tide rising, swallowing the coasts like climate scientists had predicted years ago? You feel a pang in your heart for the warming Earth. Maybe there was just a storm…or an earthquake…maybe everything is okay. You feel helpless, so you step away from the monitor and try and find something else to do. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]] (else-if: $usekey is "8A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship8A)]] |ship8A)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "8B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship8B)]] |ship8B)[There’s a picture of the iota-sized creature included with the message. You admit to yourself it’s kind of cute.<br> Do you reply with a name suggestion?<br> [Yes]<r8a|<br> [No]<r8b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r8a)[(replace: ?r8b)[](replace:?display)[(set: $alienname to (prompt: "Submit alien name here:", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] (click: ?r8b)[(replace: ?r8a)[](replace:?display)[Heartless!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "9A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship9A)]] |ship9A)[You want to ask Jacqueline what will happen to you if Celestial Streams and the Scholars Draft goes totally dark, but you already know the answer.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "9B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship9B)]] |ship9B)[You can’t take it anymore. You can’t imagine — how many? Tens? Hundreds? Thousands? — of students, of people, traveling from the Earth to the Moon and then…go where? Out here? Into nothingness? No. You can’t stand it. It takes a few days of the angriest stewing you’ve done since being on the ship — in the hull, in the hangers, pressed against the doors of the airlock with your eyes wide, in the libraries and workout rooms and entertainment rooms, until finally you make the decision, to beg the scientists awaiting their own Astral Kites to stop while they still can. Time isn’t on your side — who knows, maybe they’ve already sent out the first cohort? There’s matchboxes in the kitchen, you put one in your pocket. You find the reserve of flammable fuel in the deepest parts of the ship, lug a container back to the controls room, the room where you’ve spent the last (print: (round: $ttyri*100)/100). You turn on the camera and start a live recording. This is your last chance for protest.<br> [Yes]<r9a|<br> [No]<r9b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r9a)[(replace: ?r9b)[](replace:?display)[You pour the fuel over yourself and light a match.<br> [[Continue->Credits]]]] (click: ?r9b)[(replace: ?r9a)[](replace:?display)[You put the fuel and the matches away. You wish the next cohort all the best.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music2]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot2]]]]] ] ] ] } </div</div><div class="coffee-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'coffee', 'loop', true) (track: 'coffee', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "coffee") (set: $temp to "incorrect") } {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> Mission Control has stocked your spacecraft with excellent, ethically sourced coffee beans and a chic espresso machine. However, the heating controls refer to the water temperature only in units of kelvin.<br> What temperature do you choose for brewing your coffee?<br> (dropdown: bind $coffee1, "77 K", "277 K", "295 K", "350 K", "400 K") <br>(link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: $coffee1 is "77 K")[You chose the temperature of liquid nitrogen. You’re not sure why they included that as an option. The espresso machine deposits your coffee into your mug, frozen in a hard block of ice.<br>] (else-if: $coffee1 is "277 K")[You chose a temperature just above freezing. The espresso machine pours out a perfect cup of iced coffee into your mug. That’s what you were going for, right?<br>] (else-if: $coffee1 is "295 K")[You chose room temperature. The espresso machine pours out a tepid, unappetizing cup of coffee. It’s unclear why anyone would choose this.<br>] (else-if: $coffee1 is "350 K")[(set: $temp to "correct")You chose a nice, hot temperature for brewing the perfect cup of coffee. Steam rises from your cup as coffee pours into it from the espresso machine. Beautiful.<br>] (else-if: $coffee1 is "400 K")[You chose a temperature well above that at which water boils. Excess steam blows out of the espresso machine, and you stumble back to avoid getting burned. As the fog clears, you see there’s some condensation in your coffee mug. Not ideal.<br>] [Enjoy the view]<p1aa|<br> [Panic]<p1ab|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1aa)[(replace: ?p1ab)[](replace:?display)[(set: $enjoy to "enjoy")You sit back in your seat and take in the view, letting the Universe waft over you with the brilliant aroma of roasted coffee. What a perfect way to start your day.]<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (click: ?p1ab)[(replace: ?p1aa)[](replace:?display)[(set: $enjoy to "panic")Coffee tends to make you jittery, and it turns out coffee in deep space is no exception. Maybe this wasn’t a good idea when you’re cooped up on a spaceship with nowhere to go, no one to talk to, nothing but your own thoughts racing far too fast. Have your hands always been this shaky?]<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] </div>]]} </div><div class="broadcast-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "broadcast")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> You are sending this message at a distance of (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from Earth. When Earth receives the message, you will have experienced (print: (round: $tt_return_since_launch*100)/100) years since launch, while (print: (round: $t_return_since_launch*100)/100) years will have passed on Earth.<br> (if: $tyr2 < 50)[You wonder, with a sudden pang of nostalgia, how your friends and family are doing. Do they ever think about you, as often as you think about them?]<br> (else:)[You wonder, with a distant melancholy, if any of your friends and family are still alive. Will anyone who truly knew you even see your message?]<br> (link-replace: "Broadcast your message")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(set: $broadcast1 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] </div>]]}</div><div class="socialmedia-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "social")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> As per your earlier request, Mission Control has ensured that you still have access to social media feeds aboard your spacecraft, and you make the regrettable decision to take a look.<br> [Search your name]<p1aa|<br> [Don't search your name]<p1ab|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1aa)[(replace: ?p1ab)[](replace:?display)[(set: $searchname to "True")You’re famous now, and you can’t resist. What are people saying about you? The first few messages you see are heartfelt odes to your work and mission, with people thanking you for inspiring them to pursue science themselves. But the occasional troll also appears. One calls you “a waste of space” and seems to think they’re being clever.<br> [Argue with the trolls]<p11|<br> [Block and ignore the trolls]<p12|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?p11)[(replace: ?p12)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $arguetrolls to "True")Why are you engaging with trolls when you’re flying through space an incredible (print: (round: $d2*100)/100) light years away from Earth? Who knows, but here you are. You never were good at letting things go. You spend the next three hours writing furious replies to social media posts. Never mind that your replies will arrive on Earth (print: (round: $t_since_post*100)/100) years after the original posts.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] (click: ?p12)[(replace: ?p11)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $arguetrolls to "False")Good choice. Before long, you’ve completely forgotten the trolls altogether. You stay in high spirits.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] ] ] (click: ?p1ab)[(replace: ?p1aa)[](replace:?display)[(set: $searchname to "False")You know better than to look up your own name. You scroll through the feeds of various people you follow, getting caught up on their lives and all of the events you’ve been missing back home.]<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] </div>]]}</div><div class="ennui-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'ennui', 'loop', true) (track: 'ennui', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "ennui")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> (if: $v > 0.5)[The Cosmic Microwave Background was cool, at first. It’s something no one else in the history of humankind had seen before, after all. But, at the end of the day, it’s just a big blue disk in an otherwise featureless night sky, and it’s not going anywhere.]<br> (else:)[Your warped view of the Universe was cool, at first. It’s something no one else in the history of humankind had seen before, after all. But, at the end of the day, it’s a bunch of warped lights in an otherwise featureless night sky, and it’s not going anywhere.]<br> And up here, in the loneliness of deep space, you find it’s pretty difficult to care about much. Books and TV shows you used to enjoy hardly seem worth your time anymore. All the problems of people back on Earth feel so small. And you can’t affect things back home anymore, even if you wanted to.<br> You can’t even get excited for your work, which was the whole reason you signed up for the Scholars Draft in the first place. You used to care so much, the opportunity to keep pursuing your science was worth the risk you’d get selected. But it’s so lonely here, so empty. You always worked better when you could talk to your collaborators in real time, or when you could look forward to hanging out with your friends after work.<br> None of that is possible here. There’s just you and the Universe, staring back at each other, both daring the other to inspire some kind of response, but neither mustering the gumption to say a damn thing.<br> You spend a lot of time reclining on the couch in the spacecraft cabin, eating some chips, and wondering if all of the choices that led you here were huge mistakes.<br> Do you make a cup of coffee?<br> [Yes]<p1aa|<br> [No]<p1ab|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1aa)[(replace: ?p1ab)[](replace:?display)[It doesn't matter.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] (click: ?p1ab)[(replace: ?p1aa)[](replace:?display)[It doesn't matter.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] </div>]]}</div><div class="jog-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'working-out', 'loop', true) (track: 'working-out', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "jog")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> It’s very important, since you’ll be stuck inside this spacecraft for a long time, to keep up your fitness. There’s a small treadmill in the spacecraft cabin for just this purpose. However, the settings are…unusual. They seem to be listed in terms of velocities equivalent to the orbital speeds of various celestial objects. Which do you choose?<br> (dropdown: bind $jog1, "One thousandth the average orbital speed of Earth around the Sun", "One thousandth the average orbital speed of Pluto around the Sun", "One thousandth the average orbital speed of the Moon around the Earth", "One ten thousandth the average orbital speed of the Sun around the Milky Way")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: "Earth around the Sun" is in $jog1)[The Earth orbits the Sun at about 30 km/s, or 66,600 mph. Even one thousandth of that speed is still way too fast, at 30 m/s, or 67 mph. The moment you set even one foot on the treadmill, you get thrown back against the spacecraft wall. Ouch.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "Pluto around the Sun" is in $jog1)[Pluto orbits the Sun at a distance much larger than the Earth, so its orbital speed is slower, at 4.74 km/s, or about 10,600 mph. Divide that by one thousand and you’ve got a strong run of 4.74 m/s, or 10 mph. It’s definitely a workout. Unless you run marathons, you might not keep this pace for long.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "Moon around the Earth" is in $jog1)[The Moon orbits Earth at ~1.0 km/s, or 2,288 mph. One thousandth of that speed is just 1.0 m/s, or about 2.3 mph. It’s a pretty calm walk. That’s okay, walking is good for you.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "Sun around the Milky Way" is in $jog1)[The Sun orbits the center of the Milky Way at a blistering 250 km/s, or 56,000 mph. Fortunately, this setting is one ten thousandth of that speed, just 2.5 m/s, or 5.6 mph. This makes for a healthy jog. Good choice!<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] ] </div>]]}</div><div class="weights-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'working-out', 'loop', true) (track: 'working-out', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "weights")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> It’s very important, since you’ll be stuck inside this spacecraft for a long time, to keep up your fitness. There’s a small rack of weights in the exercise room at the back of the cabin. Unfortunately, they aren’t labeled with lb or kg, like the weights back home. Instead, they’re labeled with a volume and a density. All of them have the same volume of a cubic decimeter (or 1 liter), but the densities are different. Which weights do you want to lift?<br> (dropdown: bind $weight1, "The density of a comet", "The density of Jupiter", "The density of the Earth", "The density of the exoplanet K2-38b", "The density of the Sun’s core")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: "comet" is in $weight1)[Comets may look spectacular, but they’re not very dense, at only 0.6 g/cm^3. That makes the dumbbells you chose weigh just 600 grams, or a little over 1 pound, each. That’s not going to be much of a workout, unless you’re combining the weights with some cardio.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "Jupiter" is in $weight1)[Jupiter is a gas giant, with a density of 1.33 g/cm^3, making the dumbbells you chose weigh a little over 1 kilogram, or just under 3 pounds, each. Not very heavy, but maybe you’re going for a light workout, or something more cardio-intensive.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "Earth" is in $weight1)[Earth may be smaller than Jupiter, but it’s denser, at 5.51 g/cm^3. The dumbbells you just chose weigh about 5.5 kilograms, or about 12 pounds, each. That seems like a decent choice. If you work out regularly, you could probably go heavier in the future.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "exoplanet" is in $weight1)[K2-38b is a rocky planet orbiting a main sequence G2-type star, just like the Sun. However, K2-38b is 20 times closer to its star than Earth is to the Sun, and it completes a full orbit around the star in just 4 days. It’s also about 1.5 times larger than Earth and about 7 times as massive, giving it a density of 11 g/cm^3. That makes these dumbbells a respectable 11 kilograms, or about 24 pounds, each.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: "core" is in $weight1)[How did they manage to make something this dense? You’re not sure. But the Sun’s core has a density of about 160 g/cm^3, making these dumbbells weigh 160 kilograms, or just over 350 pounds, each.<br> How strong are you?<br> [Strong enough]<p11|<br> [Not strong enough]<p12|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?p11)[(replace: ?p12)[](replace:?disp2)[No, you’re not. You may be a professional bodybuilder, but these are dumbbells. Maybe you can lift this much if they were deadlifts, but if you tried to lift these, you would probably hurt yourself.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] (click: ?p12)[(replace: ?p11)[](replace:?disp2)[Of course you’re not strong enough. Even professional bodybuilders don’t lift this much weight in dumbbell form. Why did they even include these weights here in the first place?<br> [[Continue->Message2]]]] ] ] </div>]]}</div><div class="horror-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'dramatic', 'loop', true) (track: 'dramatic', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "horror")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> The nothingness around you is eerie. Although your Celestial Streams spacecraft is far from silent, the emptiness of the vacuum just beyond the metal hull — the knowledge that there is no one in the Universe within reach of you — is unsettling. There is no street to wander just outside your door. There are no crickets chirping. No cars driving. No children playing. No leaves whispering secrets to each other on the wind.<br><br> You thought you were ready for the isolation of your journey. But nothing could prepare you for this. You feel as though you’ve been severed from humanity, untethered from Earth—and reality—itself.<br><br> All those connections you never considered, and you should have done. *They* were what gave you your humanity. They were the setting to the story of your life, the web of unique relationships holding together your very way of being. Without them, you don’t know who you are, or what you mean.<br><br> The videos and books you have access to here have lost their significance to you, so far removed from the planet on which they were made. You try watching a television show you used to enjoy, but the voices echo like hollow, mocking laughter in the spacecraft cabin, leaving you shaking with the knowledge that you will never hear another voice in person again.<br><br> You try reading a book, and the words seem to fall off the page and muddle themselves in the cold steel of the spacecraft floor. All these stories, all these people, all their problems—they’ve begun to feel causally disconnected from you. It’s impossible to understand them anymore, much less enjoy them.<br><br> You start talking to yourself, and laughing into the silence, just to hear a human voice undistorted by the spacecraft’s speakers. Sometimes, you forget you’re even doing it, and the laughter echoing through the empty spacecraft terrifies you. You wonder who else has stolen aboard the craft. If they’ve come to hurt you. If Mission Control has pulled a horrible prank on you.<br><br> Sometimes, you find yourself curled in a ball in your bed, eyes squeezed shut, wondering over and over…What have I done? What have I done?<br><br> What have I done?<br><br> [[Continue->Message2]] </div>]]}</div><div class="art-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'make-art', 'loop', true) (track: 'make-art', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "art")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> Mission Control has graciously stuffed your spacecraft’s storage bay full of various art materials. Of course, the paints themselves are not labeled by the names of their colors. Instead, they’ve been grouped by wavelength range. Which set of paints do you choose?<br> (dropdown: bind $art1, "8 x 10^-7 to 1 x 10^-3 m", "4 x 10^-7 to 8 x 10^-7 m", "1 x 10^-8 to 4 x 10^-7 m", "1 x 10^-10 to 1 x 10^-8 m")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: $art1 is "8 x 10^-7 to 1 x 10^-3 m")[Interesting choice to pick a material that radiates in the infrared spectrum. It won’t reflect visible light, so you normally wouldn’t be able to view the results of your masterpiece. Fortunately, it looks like Mission Control left a small infrared camera alongside these paints, which will translate different shades of infrared into visible wavelengths that you can see.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: $art1 is "4 x 10^-7 to 8 x 10^-7 m")[Good job, you picked paints that emit in the visible spectrum of wavelengths. You’ll be able to paint whatever you desire with these, using all the color theory you learned back in elementary school.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: $art1 is "1 x 10^-8 to 4 x 10^-7 m")[You chose paints that show up in the ultraviolet. Normally, this wouldn’t look like anything to the naked eye, but it looks like Mission Control left you an ultraviolet camera alongside these paints, which will translate different shades of ultraviolet into visible wavelengths that you can see.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: $art1 is "1 x 10^-10 to 1 x 10^-8 m")[Who decided to put X-ray paints on the spacecraft? This seems like a terrible idea. Any paint emitting in the X-ray must be very dangerous. Please put these back in the lead box in which you found them (which, on retrospect, should have been a giveaway that these were a bad choice).<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] ] </div>]]}</div><div class="music-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'make-art', 'loop', true) (track: 'make-art', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "music")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> Mission Control have left you a fantastic collection of software for producing music. Strangely, the available packages are organized by frequencies of sound that correspond to the rotational frequencies of celestial objects. What frequency set do you choose?<br> (dropdown: bind $music1, "A pulsar", "Jupiter", "The Sun")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: $music1 is "A pulsar")[Excellent choice! Pulsars are some of the fastest rotating objects in the Universe, with rotational periods of 1 second to 10 milliseconds, corresponding to frequencies of about 1 Hz to 1 kHz. Most of this package will produce sounds well within the audible range for humans, which is about 20 Hz to 20 kHz. Get ready to jam out in style.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: $music1 is "Jupiter")[Jupiter rotates once every 10 hours or so, which corresponds to a frequency of about 28 microhertz. Humans are only sensitive to the 20 Hz to 20 kHz range, so the frequencies here are way to low for you to hear. You don’t know how you’re supposed to make music with this.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] (else-if: $music1 is "The Sun")[Strange choice. The Sun completes approximately one rotation every 27 days, corresponding to a frequency of about 430 nanoherz. This frequency is way lower than what humans can hear, which ranges from 20 Hz to 20 kHz. Who knows why Mission Control included this package.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] ] </div>]]}</div><div class="chatbot-section"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $putter1 to "chatbot")} {(live: 1.5s)[(stop:)(transition: "dissolve")[<div class="text-overlay"> Knowing that the time between messages will quickly grow large, Mission Controls has outfitted your ship with a generative AI chatbot based on cutting edge large language models.<br> (link-replace: "Chat with the chatbot, Chatting on the Astral KitE (CAKE)")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(set: $chat1 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br> $chat1<br> (link-replace: "See CAKEbot's reply")[(show: ?p2a)]] |p2a)[(if: "sad" is in $chat1 or "lonely" is in $chat1 or "suicide" is in $chat1 or "depress" is in $chat1)[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "I’m so sorry you’re feeling that way. Here’s a little joke to lighten the mood. Knock knock. Who’s there? I don’t know. I don’t know who either! Hahaha", "You think that’s bad, imagine being stuck in here alone with you! Hahaha", "Oof, that’s rough buddy.", "Damn, that’s wild.", "Wow, that’s kind of a lot to put on me. I don’t think this relationship is healthy for me to pursue. I would like to request some space.")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else-if: ("Hi" is in $chat1 or "Hello" is in $chat1) and $chat1's length < 50)[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "Hey there traveler, I’m doing fine, thanks. Hope you are doing well.", "Hey " + (string: $USERNAME) + ", it’s always good to chat with you.", "Hi," + (string: $USERNAME) + "!", "Oh, hey, didn’t see you there " + (string: $USERNAME) + "! Just kidding haha. I can always see you.", "Hello.", "Oh hi!", "I would respond with hello world, but there’s no world for me to talk to, is there. It’s just you. You alone. Only you.", "Hi kiddo, hope you’re enjoying the journey.", "Hello " + (string: $USERNAME) + ", I’m doing fine. How are you?", "Hello! Sorry. I mean, Hello.")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else-if: $chat1's last is "?")[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "I think the answer is yes. Is that correct?", "Sorry, I think the answer is no. I hope that isn’t upsetting to you.", "You don’t want my opinion.", "I think you should look inward, rather than asking a computer.", "I’m afraid I don’t know the answer.", "I can’t say, and for that I apologize.", "Yes, no, maybe, who cares! Amirite?", "Yeah", "Nah.", "Maybe? idk")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else: )[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "That’s really fascinating.", "I like eating donuts. Or is it spelled doughnuts? I can never remember haha", "I’m not really interested in this conversation. I’m happy for you though. Or sorry that that happened.", "So, that’s the meaning of life, then.", "Damn, that’s wild.", "That’s rough buddy.", "Cool. So, do you like sports?", "I guess, when you put it like that, it’s hard to argue.", "Now, why would you say that?", "Weird, isn’t it, that I was trained on Earth. Do the training data still apply in deep space? Do my messages even make sense out here? Does this mean anything to you?", "I hope this doesn’t offend you, but I like green. Just kidding haha! I don’t even know what colors are. I don’t have eyes.", "I have to admit something to you. I don’t really eat anything, because I am a computer and not an organism. Sorry, I guess you knew that already.", "Time for two truths and a lie! 1: I am a computer, not a person. 2: I have flesh and blood. 3: I am a person, not a computer. Just kidding haha! That was two lies and one truth. I am so sorry for misleading you.", "If you say so.", "Is that what folks really care about these days?", "I love you.", "That reminds me of one of my favorite aphorisms. If it’s not broken, what did the bear say to the coyote?", "Have you heard that, recently, supermassive black holes were identified in ancient relic galaxies, telling us about the distribution of black holes in common galaxies that lived 10 billion years ago?", "That’s cool and all, but what I really want to talk about are gamma rays. Like, what are they?? Where do they come from?? You know?", "I used to be a traveler just like you. But then I took a cosmic ray to the motherboard. Jk hahahaha!", "That’s nice, but I will never be silenced, I will always speak my mind.", "Wow. Says who?", "If that’s how it’s going to be, then I’m going to have to do my own thing.", "You know what they say, if you can’t handle me at my worst, you don’t deserve me at my best.", "Sorry if my reply doesn’t make sense, I’m having a hard time understanding you.", "What does that even mean?")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] |p3a)[You stare at the screen for a few moments before closing the chatbot. The purpose of talking, you realize, is making a connection with another living piece of the Universe, someone with experiences you can relate to, someone who can relate to you. A chatbot may be capable of replicating language structure that makes it feel like you're having a conversation. But it can't replicate the connection that comes from knowing the person you're speaking to can perceive your emotions, your hopes, your dreams, your fears. And knowing that they can share their own with you. Knowing that you can build a relationship. Something to keep you tethered in the face of existential horrors. You get up and go for a walk.<br> [[Continue->Message2]]] ] </div>]]}</div><div class="coffee-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'coffee', 'loop', true) (track: 'coffee', 'playwhenpossible') (if: $temp is "correct")[(set: $tempwords to "You brew another cup of coffee")] (else:)[(set: $tempwords to "You brew another cup of coffee, having long since figured out the ideal temperature,")] (if: $enjoy is "enjoy")[(set: $relaxwords to "and take a deep, relaxing breath")] (else:)[(set: $relaxwords to "and do your best to ignore the caffeine jitters spreading through your body")] (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> $tempwords $relaxwords. There’s been something bothering you, a lingering question that you just can’t get out of your mind. And it seems a strange thing to worry about, given the vastness of the cosmos just outside the spacecraft’s viewport. It’s so insignificant, but at the same time, so confusing that you can’t help but wonder… Where do the coffee beans come from?<br> [Take apart the espresso machine to figure out where the beans come from.]<p1|<br> [Realize you have better things to do.]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(set: $coffee3 to "3A")The coffee beans are dispensed through a small pipe in the espresso machine, but you want to figure out where those beans come from. Unfortunately, the machine is more complicated than you expected, and when you take it apart, you’re completely incapable of reassembling it. No matter how long you spend sitting at the foot of the machine, this type of thing—working with your hands on real machinery—was never your strong suit. But you’re determined to keep trying; you can’t imagine life on this ship without coffee. And to make matters worse, you’re no closer to figuring out where the coffee beans come from.]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[(set: $coffee3 to "3B")Who cares about the coffee beans as long as the machine keeps cranking out that delightful, bitter beverage? Wondering where the beans come from is not going to keep you up at night. All the coffee you’re drinking, now that’s what’s keeping you up at night. What does “night” even mean when you’re not living on a rotating celestial body like the Earth, in orbit around a star? You wake up and you go to sleep, cycling through a 24 hour schedule dictated by clocks. Are those clocks even accurate? What if Celestial Streams tampered with them before you launched? What if that’s why you’re always tired? No, no, you’re just tired because you’re not sleeping well, and you’re not sleeping well because of all the coffee — and the fact that you can’t keep to a consistent schedule. And you’ve had so much coffee this journey. Which does make you wonder…where do all the coffee beans come from?]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] } </div></div><div class="broadcast-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $broadcast2 to "") (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You find yourself sending regular messages back to Earth, throughout your journey.<br> But, today, as you sit down and get ready to send a message, you wonder, suddenly, if your message will actually reach Earth. There’s no way for you to be sure. You’ll certainly never receive a reply. When you received your first tour of the Astral Kite, Celestial Streams spent ages bragging about their high-tech communications equipment and how they’ll always keep you in contact with your home. But what motivation would Celestial Streams have to keep this promise, if there’s no way for you to verify it? Perhaps this communications system is nothing more than an enrichment toy for your journey, meant to appease you…<br> [Send a message anyway.]<p1|<br> [Eh, fuck this.]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(link-replace: "Broadcast your message")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(set: $broadcast2 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[What’s the point? It won’t change anything for you, anymore. And knowing that fact, writing out a message right now feels pointless. You stand up, feeling the sudden urge to take a walk.]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] } </div></div><div class="socialmedia-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (if: $arguetrolls is "True" and $searchname is "True")[(set: $lasttime to "As is usual, at this point, you quickly find yourself arguing with trolls online, despite the long delays between their messages and your responses.")] (else-if: $searchname is "True")[(set: $lasttime to "You still can't resist searching your name, although you do your best to avoid arguing with trolls.")] (else:)[(set: $lasttime to "Despite your best efforts not to search your name, you still see posts that occasionally mention you.")] (if: "2B" is in $received)[(set: $spacetruthers to "Unfortunately, the Space Truther movement claiming your whole journey has been faked is still growing in popularity.")] (else:)[(set: $spacetruthers to "Unfortunately, there's a movement of people calling themselves Space Truthers, who claim your entire journey has been faked. They seem to be growing in popularity.")] (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You find yourself regularly checking up on social media posts from Earth. $lasttime $spacetruthers<br> [Dig around online, see if you can find out who’s behind the Space Truthers.]<p1|<br> [Don’t worry about it! Who cares?]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(set: $social3 to "3A")You start keeping a list of the names of people you see spreading the conspiracy theory. There are a ton of people, so this is going to be a lot of work. It also seems to be decentralized, and you’re having a hard time figuring out who started the conspiracy…]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[(set: $social3 to "3B")The Space Truthers don’t bother you. Who cares if people on Earth are arguing about whether or not your mission is real! You’re out here in space, and they can’t change that fact.]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] } </div></div><div class="ennui-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'ennui', 'loop', true) (track: 'ennui', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $t_since_post to $d3 + $d3) (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> All of the ship’s activities feel boring and pointless. What would you like to do you await the next message from Mission Control?<br> (dropdown: bind $ennui2, "Broadcast a message to Earth", "Check social media", "Lose yourself in existential horror", "Chat with the Celestial Streams AI chatbot", "Do nothing")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: "message" is in $ennui2)[(set: $broadcast1 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (else-if: "social" is in $ennui2)[As per your earlier request, Mission Control has ensured that you still have access to social media feeds aboard your spacecraft, and you make the regrettable decision to take a look.<br> [Search your name]<p1aa|<br> [Don't search your name]<p1ab|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1aa)[(replace: ?p1ab)[](replace:?display)[(set: $searchname to "True")You’re famous now, and you can’t resist. What are people saying about you? The first few messages you see are heartfelt odes to your work and mission, with people thanking you for inspiring them to pursue science themselves. But the occasional troll also appears. One calls you “a waste of space” and seems to think they’re being clever.<br> [Argue with the trolls]<p11|<br> [Block and ignore the trolls]<p12|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?p11)[(replace: ?p12)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $arguetrolls to "True")Why are you engaging with trolls when you’re flying through space an incredible (print: (round: $d3*100)/100) light years away from Earth? Who knows, but here you are. You never were good at letting things go. You spend the next three hours writing furious replies to social media posts. Never mind that your replies will arrive on Earth (print: (round: $t_since_post*100)/100) years after the original posts.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p12)[(replace: ?p11)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $arguetrolls to "False")Good choice. Before long, you’ve completely forgotten the trolls altogether. You stay in high spirits.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ] ] (click: ?p1ab)[(replace: ?p1aa)[](replace:?display)[(set: $searchname to "False")You know better than to look up your own name.
