You scroll through the feeds of various people you follow, getting caught up on their lives and all of the events you’ve been missing back home.]<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (else-if: "horror" is in $ennui2)[The nothingness around you is eerie. Although your Celestial Streams spacecraft is far from silent, the emptiness of the vacuum just beyond the metal hull — the knowledge that there is no one in the Universe within reach of you — is unsettling. There is no street to wander just outside your door. There are no crickets chirping. No cars driving. No children playing. No leaves whispering secrets to each other on the wind.<br> You thought you were ready for the isolation of your journey. But nothing could prepare you for this. You feel as though you’ve been severed from humanity, untethered from Earth—and reality—itself.<br> All those connections you never considered, and you should have done. *They* were what gave you your humanity. They were the setting to the story of your life, the web of unique relationships holding together your very way of being. Without them, you don’t know who you are, or what you mean.<br> The videos and books you have access to here have lost their significance to you, so far removed from the planet on which they were made. You try watching a television show you used to enjoy, but the voices echo like hollow, mocking laughter in the spacecraft cabin, leaving you shaking with the knowledge that you will never hear another voice in person again.<br> You try reading a book, and the words seem to fall off the page and muddle themselves in the cold steel of the spacecraft floor. All these stories, all these people, all their problems—they’ve begun to feel causally disconnected from you. It’s impossible to understand them anymore, much less enjoy them.<br> You start talking to yourself, and laughing into the silence, just to hear a human voice undistorted by the spacecraft’s speakers. Sometimes, you forget you’re even doing it, and the laughter echoing through the empty spacecraft terrifies you. You wonder who else has stolen aboard the craft. If they’ve come to hurt you. If Mission Control has pulled a horrible prank on you.<br> Sometimes, you find yourself curled in a ball in your bed, eyes squeezed shut, wondering over and over…What have I done? What have I done?<br> What have I done?<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (else-if: "chatbot" is in $ennui2)[Knowing that the time between messages will quickly grow large, Mission Controls has outfitted your ship with a generative AI chatbot based on cutting edge large language models.<br> (link-replace: "Chat with the chatbot, Chatting on the Astral KitE (CAKE)")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(set: $chat1 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br> $chat1<br> (link-replace: "See CAKEbot's reply")[(show: ?p2a)]] |p2a)[(if: "sad" is in $chat1 or "lonely" is in $chat1 or "suicide" is in $chat1 or "depress" is in $chat1)[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "I’m so sorry you’re feeling that way. Here’s a little joke to lighten the mood. Knock knock. Who’s there? I don’t know. I don’t know who either! Hahaha", "You think that’s bad, imagine being stuck in here alone with you! Hahaha", "Oof, that’s rough buddy.", "Damn, that’s wild.", "Wow, that’s kind of a lot to put on me. I don’t think this relationship is healthy for me to pursue. I would like to request some space.")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else-if: ("Hi" is in $chat1 or "Hello" is in $chat1) and $chat1's length < 50)[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "Hey there traveler, I’m doing fine, thanks. Hope you are doing well.", "Hey " + (string: $USERNAME) + ", it’s always good to chat with you.", "Hi," + (string: $USERNAME) + "!", "Oh, hey, didn’t see you there " + (string: $USERNAME) + "! Just kidding haha. I can always see you.", "Hello.", "Oh hi!", "I would respond with hello world, but there’s no world for me to talk to, is there. It’s just you. You alone. Only you.", "Hi kiddo, hope you’re enjoying the journey.", "Hello " + (string: $USERNAME) + ", I’m doing fine. How are you?", "Hello! Sorry. I mean, Hello.")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else-if: $chat1's last is "?")[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "I think the answer is yes. Is that correct?", "Sorry, I think the answer is no. I hope that isn’t upsetting to you.", "You don’t want my opinion.", "I think you should look inward, rather than asking a computer.", "I’m afraid I don’t know the answer.", "I can’t say, and for that I apologize.", "Yes, no, maybe, who cares! Amirite?", "Yeah", "Nah.", "Maybe? idk")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] (else: )[(text-color: "Wheat")[(either: "That’s really fascinating.", "I like eating donuts. Or is it spelled doughnuts? I can never remember haha", "I’m not really interested in this conversation. I’m happy for you though. Or sorry that that happened.", "So, that’s the meaning of life, then.", "Damn, that’s wild.", "That’s rough buddy.", "Cool. So, do you like sports?", "I guess, when you put it like that, it’s hard to argue.", "Now, why would you say that?", "Weird, isn’t it, that I was trained on Earth. Do the training data still apply in deep space? Do my messages even make sense out here? Does this mean anything to you?", "I hope this doesn’t offend you, but I like green. Just kidding haha! I don’t even know what colors are. I don’t have eyes.", "I have to admit something to you. I don’t really eat anything, because I am a computer and not an organism. Sorry, I guess you knew that already.", "Time for two truths and a lie! 1: I am a computer, not a person. 2: I have flesh and blood. 3: I am a person, not a computer. Just kidding haha! That was two lies and one truth. I am so sorry for misleading you.", "If you say so.", "Is that what folks really care about these days?", "I love you.", "That reminds me of one of my favorite aphorisms. If it’s not broken, what did the bear say to the coyote?", "Have you heard that, recently, supermassive black holes were identified in ancient relic galaxies, telling us about the distribution of black holes in common galaxies that lived 10 billion years ago?", "That’s cool and all, but what I really want to talk about are gamma rays. Like, what are they?? Where do they come from?? You know?", "I used to be a traveler just like you. But then I took a cosmic ray to the motherboard. Jk hahahaha!", "That’s nice, but I will never be silenced, I will always speak my mind.", "Wow. Says who?", "If that’s how it’s going to be, then I’m going to have to do my own thing.", "You know what they say, if you can’t handle me at my worst, you don’t deserve me at my best.", "Sorry if my reply doesn’t make sense, I’m having a hard time understanding you.", "What does that even mean?")<br>] (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p3a)]] |p3a)[You stare at the screen for a few moments before closing the chatbot. The purpose of talking, you realize, is making a connection with another living piece of the Universe, someone with experiences you can relate to, someone who can relate to you. A chatbot may be capable of replicating language structure that makes it feel like you're having a conversation. But it can't replicate the connection that comes from knowing the person you're speaking to can perceive your emotions, your hopes, your dreams, your fears. And knowing that they can share their own with you. Knowing that you can build a relationship. Something to keep you tethered in the face of existential horrors. You get up and go for a walk.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] ]] (else:)[ { (live: 3s)[ (stop:) (t8n:"dissolve")[[[Continue->Message3]]] ] } ] ] } </div></div><div class="jog-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'working-out', 'loop', true) (track: 'working-out', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You used to love going for a jog back on Earth, but you always preferred running outside, and it didn’t take long for you to grow bored of the ship’s treadmill. Fortunately, the Astral Kite is huge, and you’ve taken to going on runs through the ship’s many winding corridors.<br> Still, it doesn’t take long before you’ve seen the whole of the ship. So, today, when you pass a small closet door in the belly of the Astral Kite, you decide to open it, just to see what’s inside.<br> To your shock, it’s not a closet at all, but a narrow stairwell down.<br> Seeking new terrain, you jog down the stairs, fluorescent lights flashing on overhead as you step down into a claustrophobic corridor.<br> At the end of the corridor is a rectangular mahogany door held between two columns of rough gray stone. Shadows seem to cling like fog to the rich, dark umber wood, enshrouding a heavy brass door knocker at the center of the door, and a brass doorknob at its side.<br> The earthly materials of this door and its frame are decidedly out of place amid the sleek, lifeless metal of the Astral Kite. They enthrall you, transport you to another place, someplace far from the vacuum of space, someplace more like Earth. For it is alive, or at least, it *was* once living. It is a dank, rattling breath that fills the ship’s otherwise sterile halls with lifeblood.<br> [Open the door]<p1|<br> [Use the knocker]<p2|<br> [Leave this place]<p3|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace: ?p3)[](replace:?display)[(set: $jog3 to "3A")The brass of the doorknob is frigid, numbing your fingertips. It rotates, but the heavy wood does not budge; the door seems to be locked.<br> Oh, well.<br> You stand there for a moment longer, before turning and jogging back up the stairs.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace: ?p3)[](replace:?display)[(set: $jog3 to "3B")*Bang. Bang. Bang*. It echoes through the cramped corridor. Your muscles tense and the hair on the back your neck stands up. It feels like something carnivorous is looming over you, fetid breath on your spine.<br> You find your shoulders hunching, trying to make yourself small. You suddenly feel like it was a mistake to make so much noise.<br> You stagger away from the door, pressing your back against the wall, and sprint back up the stairs.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] (click: ?p3)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(set: $jog3 to "3C")A sudden, irrational fear settles into your stomach. This place is hollow, and its hollowness is seeping into your bones, a vacuum leaving your limbs weak and trembling. Your eyes squint against the too-bright fluorescent lights which somehow fail to reach the shadowy door.<br> You turn and run.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]] } </div></div><div class="weights-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'working-out', 'loop', true) (track: 'working-out', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You’ve been working out pretty regularly for a while, now. But something strange has been happening the last couple days.<br> The weights you’ve been using recently (those labeled with the density of the exoplanet K2-38b, which weigh about 11 kg each), have begun to feel too heavy for you. It doesn’t make sense; you ought to be getting stronger! You’ve been eating plenty of protein and taking your creatine supplements. What’s going on?<br> [This is just “the hump” people like talking about, push through it and work out harder!]<p1|<br> [Maybe you’ve somehow gotten sick, go to the medical bay]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[You steady your resolve and push through. You’re going to finish this workout no matter what! Sweat beads on your forehead as you curl your biceps, and you start gasping for breath. Weakness is a lie! Keep pushing! Your limbs are like jelly, shaky and useless. It doesn’t matter. This is how you get strong!<br> The next thing you know, you’re on the floor, the weights rolled off to your side, your head aching and thoughts swimming, confused. You think you hear a voice behind you, telling you to leave the room.<br> [Leave the room]<p1a|<br> [No weakness!! Try to pick up the weights and keep lifting!]<p1b|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?p1a)[(replace: ?p1b)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $weights3 to "3A")Limbs shaking, vision blurring, you crawl, hauling your body for the door. Somehow, you make it. The door slams shut behind you as you gasp for breath, oxygen at last returning to your body.<br> The voice you’re hearing is an automated AI on the ship, reporting low oxygen levels in the exercise room. It must have told you to leave, and now it’s telling you to go to the medical bay.<br> You look longingly back to the exercise room, as automated ship systems seal it off. Now how are you supposed to work out?<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p1b)[(replace: ?p1a)[](replace:?disp2)[(set: $weights3 to "3A")Your trembling fingers reach for the weights.<br> The next thing you know, you’re waking up on the medical bay, an oxygen mask over your mouth and nose.<br> The Astral Kite’s medical bot is reading out numbers in a monotonous tone, going on and on about your low oxygen levels and how you need to take health warnings more seriously.<br> You almost check out from the conversation, until you hear the bot say your condition was caused by an oxygen leak in the exercise room. The room has now been permanently sealed off to protect the rest of the ship.<br> You cry out in wordless anguish! How are you going to exercise now???<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[Sensibly, you head to the medical bay, where the ship’s medical robot runs a series of tests on you, determining that your oxygen levels are low. That’s strange…<br> As an oxygen mask is fitted over your mouth and nose, you log into a computer in the medical bay and open up the ship’s systems. You flip through the list until you see one flashing orange—there’s a low oxygen warning in the exercise room!<br> [Seal off the exercise room to protect the rest of the ship]<p2a|<br> [Try to identify and fix the leak]<p2b|<br> []<disp22| (click: ?p2a)[(replace: ?p2b)[](replace:?disp22)[(set: $weights3 to "3A")You’re not going to play around with the idea of depressurization out in deep space.<br> You seal off the exercise room. You’ll never be able to enter it again for the rest of your journey. At least the rest of the ship will be safe.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p2b)[(replace: ?p2a)[](replace:?disp22)[(set: $weights3 to "3B")Against the insistent advice from various ship robots calling after you and several warning alarms echoing through the corridors, you grab one of the Astral Kite’s extravehicular suits to protect you from oxygen loss and reenter the exercise room, wielding a series of sensors and an emergency repair kit.<br> Using an atmospheric sensor, it isn’t hard to identify the leak as coming directly from a pipe in the ceiling. You break out the emergency repair kit and patch the pipe.<br> There, that ought to prevent any further leaking.<br> You wait a bit for the oxygen levels to renormalize, and then it’s back to working out!<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ]] } </div></div><div class="horror-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'dramatic', 'loop', true) (track: 'dramatic', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You come to fear leaving your room, though it offers little respite from the horror that consumes your every waking thought. Your room is a prison, your bed a chain and manacles, and everything beyond it a pit of shadowed despair too fearful to endure.<br> And why should you endure it? There is no point to stepping outside, except to eat food and relieve yourself. You hate checking the ship’s bridge for messages, for when a message arrives, it feels like a sliver of another reality breaking into this one, some ancient action taken with no regard for its far-flung consequence, a secret world you might once have imagined to exist elbowing its way into your present life in a complete dereliction of causality.<br> You begin to fear that you are losing time, losing awareness of yourself, and your surroundings, and your own actions. You know that you must leave your room occasionally, because when you wake up today (whenever today is) you are no more hungry than usual, and there is no smell to your room, so you must still be using the ship’s restroom.<br> These strange thoughts linger, tormenting you. When did you last leave? You can’t remember. You can’t remember. Why can’t you remember? You ought to be able to remember…<br> [Curl back up in bed]<p1|<br> [Leave your room in search of food]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[That’s enough existing for today. You turn off the lights and pull the covers back over your head. Whatever nightmares you have can’t be worse than this.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[You creep toward the door of your room and hunch to the side of it, taking deep, steadying breaths for a minute. When you’ve finally worked up the courage, you wave your hand in front of the sensor, and the door slides open.<br> You wince against the bright lights that come on in the hallway, incongruent and inducing a tense pain behind your temples.<br> You glance both ways down the hallway and gasp. There’s something scratched into the wall just outside your room.<br> [Retreat back to bed]<p2a|<br> [Read the graffiti]<p2b|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?p2a)[(replace: ?p2b)[](replace:?display)[That’s more than enough of that. You don’t remember scratching anything into the wall. You don’t even know how you would have done that! Surely one of the ship’s robots would be programmed to prevent it from defacing the ship. But who else could have done it? …Is there someone else on the ship??<br> You swiftly retreat back into your room, swipe the door closed, and tuck yourself back under the covers.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p2b)[(replace: ?p2a)[](replace:?display)[You read the graffiti more closely… *Who’s there who are you show yourself who else is here?*<br> You gasp and stagger backward. You don’t remember writing this. Surely you would remember, wouldn’t you? It’s carved into the metal wall, which would take considerable effort.<br> But, who else could have made it? There shouldn’t be anyone else on the ship…<br> That’s enough of being adventurous for today. You close the door and get back in bed.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ]] } </div></div><div class="art-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'make-art', 'loop', true) (track: 'make-art', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You’re enthused to try your hand at another painting. The creation of art has been a self-soothing act of humankind for generations and generations, as in a group or alone. You think back to the ancient, pre-human art — the hooves and hands painted on cave walls, the smoothed beads and other pieces of jewelry, and the ornate headpieces archeologists find amidst dirt and buried caves. You feel a distinct sense of belonging to a species of artists. Even alone in space, the desire to create provides you with a sense of meaning and purpose. Someday, maybe someone will find your ship and your artwork, and the bridge of time will be surmounted again. <br> Choose your paint set:<br> (dropdown: bind $art1, "8 x 10^-7 to 1 x 10^-3 m", "4 x 10^-7 to 8 x 10^-7 m", "1 x 10^-8 to 4 x 10^-7 m", "1 x 10^-10 to 1 x 10^-8 m")<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p1a)] |p1a)[(if: $art1 is "8 x 10^-7 to 1 x 10^-3 m")[Interesting choice to pick a material that radiates in the infrared spectrum. It won’t reflect visible light, so you normally wouldn’t be able to view the results of your masterpiece. Fortunately, it looks like Mission Control left a small infrared camera alongside these paints, which will translate different shades of infrared into visible wavelengths that you can see.<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p2a)]] (else-if: $art1 is "4 x 10^-7 to 8 x 10^-7 m")[Good job, you picked paints that emit in the visible spectrum of wavelengths. You’ll be able to paint whatever you desire with these, using all the color theory you learned back in elementary school.<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p2a)]] (else-if: $art1 is "1 x 10^-8 to 4 x 10^-7 m")[You chose paints that show up in the ultraviolet. Normally, this wouldn’t look like anything to the naked eye, but it looks like Mission Control left you an ultraviolet camera alongside these paints, which will translate different shades of ultraviolet into visible wavelengths that you can see.<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p2a)]] (else-if: $art1 is "1 x 10^-10 to 1 x 10^-8 m")[Who decided to put X-ray paints on the spacecraft? This seems like a terrible idea. Any paint emitting in the X-ray must be very dangerous. Please put these back in the lead box in which you found them (which, on retrospect, should have been a giveaway that these were a bad choice).<br> (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p2a)]] |p2a)[Feeling pleased at the idea of your legacy, you squirt out a fresh plop of paint and notice a tear in the tube, causing paint to come out both ends at once. You groan to yourself and inspect the tear. It looks like it’s been…chewed? The marks of teeth are undeniable. You wonder if you’ve gone so mad in the ship that you started gnawing at paint tubes and don’t even remember doing it — Celestial Streams warned you strange things happen to the mind in isolation. As you stare deeply into the hole in the tube, haloed by bite marks, you hear a sudden scuffling noise from the corner of the room. You drop the paint — you’re frightened — there is no scuffling on the ship — what would there be to scuffle? On Earth — tree branches scuffle, people’s feet scuffle, cloth scuffles on skin in the wind and tires scuffle heavy on asphalt. Here, there is hardly a noise from the air conditioning units. As such, the scuffle is horrific to you. Your heart rate rises as you pinpoint the scuffle noise from within a cabinet, flush with the floor, used for storing art supplies.<br> Do you open the cabinet?<br> [Yes!]<p1|<br> [No!!!]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[There’s no time to think this through. You drop to the ground and fling open the cabinet. More frenetic scuffles, some supplies seemingly shimmy on their own in the very backest, darkest corner of the cabinet. <br> Do you keep looking?<br> [Yes!]<p11|<br> [No!!!]<p12|<br> []<disp1| (click: ?p11)[(replace: ?p12)[](replace:?disp1)[Your hands are trembling now, but you move the supplies aside to find a hole in the back of the cabinet, as wide as your fist and as black as the sky outside. Still shaking, you close the cabinet door. That’s enough excitement for one day.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p12)[(replace: ?p11)[](replace:?disp1)[You shut the cabinet doors. Should you tell Mission Controls? Can they do anything about it? Maybe you imagined the sound…maybe when you opened the cabinet so suddenly, it jostled things around…yes, you probably just imagined it. <br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[You leave the room in a hurry. Maybe you imagined the sound.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] ]] } </div></div><div class="music-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'make-art', 'loop', true) (track: 'make-art', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You return to the music room to play some more jams, only to find that the piece you composed the last time you were here—notes scribbled on scrap paper by hand—is missing. To make matters even more confusing, there appears to be another piece of music in its place.<br> [Go looking for your missing piece]<p1|<br> [Try to figure out who composed this new piece]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(set: $music3 to "3A")You disregard the new piece of music, shoving the sheet music away somewhere in storage. Instead, you scour the ship everywhere for the missing sheet music, but you can’t seem to find it. Maybe you just misplaced it? What if you’re sleepwalking? Could you have accidentally thrown it away? After spending far too long searching, you decide to give up and just make a new piece of music. You’ve gotten pretty good, with all the downtime you’ve had to practice.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[(set: $music3 to "3B")Who cares what happened to your old piece? You probably just misplaced it. Instead of worrying about that, you transcribe this new piece using the software on the ship with the frequency range based on the rotational period of a pulsar (which you have long since confirmed is the only software package that produces music which humans are capable of hearing). The piece is haunting and beautiful, and it’s named, “Ode to $USERNAME”.<br> You search through the ship, but find no evidence of anyone else on board. It’s unclear who could have written the piece, but the question continues to plague you…<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] } </div></div><div class="chatbot-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'social-media', 'loop', true) (track: 'social-media', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttyri to $ttyr4) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt4 have passed for you on the ship.<br> Despite the lackluster, lifeless responses you receive, you find yourself coming back to chat with the CAKEbot periodically, if only out of boredom. It’s fun to feel like you can chat in real time with someone…or something. You didn’t realize how much you’d miss that, the feeling of a conversation. And CAKEbot has gotten better at sounding human, in the time since your first interaction.<br> It doesn’t even matter to you if the person you’re chatting with is real, does it?<br> [No, it doesn’t matter. Just let me chat so I can feel alive!]<p1|<br> [Actually, it makes a pretty big difference.]<p2|<br> []<display| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?display)[(set: $chatbot3 to "3A")This is great! Who cares if the bot is “alive” or not, it’s something capable of holding a conversation (or something approaching a conversation, anyway). And even if, at first, you found its lack of connection frustrating, it has gotten a lot better at interacting with you and knowing your likes and dislikes. CAKEbot is basically the closest thing you’re ever going to have to a friend, ever again.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?display)[(set: $chatbot3 to "3B")In fact, you have no intention of trying to form a “connection” with a computer, something only ever to mimic feeling, rather than feel it.<br> But then again, some of the things it has said to you recently have seemed more heartfelt, more…real.<br> A small part of you grows fearful. What if the CAKEbot *is* alive? What if it’s more than a generative AI?<br> What if the things it says have real *meaning* to them? Real weight?<br> There’s only one way to find out.<br> You make your way to the Astral Kite’s libraries to start studying how to administer the Turing test.<br> [[Continue->Message3]]]] } </div></div><div class="space-section"><div class="text-overlay"> { (masteraudio: 'stopall') (track: 'cycle14', 'loop', true) (track: 'cycle14', 'playwhenpossible') <!-- DON'T REBUILD MESSAGE BANKS! --!> <!-- select message key based on earth time! --!> (set: $received to it + (a: $usekey)) (set: $di to $d5) (set: $ttyri to $ttyr5) (set: $tti to $tt5) (set: $tyri to $tyr5) (if: $tyri - $di < 1/12)[(set: $usearray to $m12)] <!-- me sent[yr] = tyr[yr] - d[ly] --!> (else-if: $tyri - $di < 1/6)[(set: $usearray to $m123)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 1/2)[(set: $usearray to $m12345)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 1)[(set: $usearray to $m2345)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 3)[(set: $usearray to $m3456)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 5)[(set: $usearray to $m456)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 10)[(set: $usearray to $m567)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 20)[(set: $usearray to $m678)] (else-if: $tyri - $di < 50)[(set: $usearray to $m789)] (else: )[(set: $usearray to $m89)] (set: $usekey to (either: ...$usearray)) <!-- remove used variable from all arrays, so message isn't selected again! --!> (for: each _temp, ...$m12)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m12 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m123)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m123 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m12345)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m12345 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m2345)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m2345 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m3456)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m3456 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m456)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m456 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m567)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m567 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m678)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m678 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m789)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m789 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m89)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m89 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (set: $message to $allmessage's $usekey) <!-- /* TO DO: Check about messages that prevent future messages (e.g. 6D) and remove future keys as needed! */ --!> <!-- /* TO DO: CHECK IF 4B WORKED WITH IMAGES FROM INSPIRED KIDS! */ --!> (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { (if: "6D" is in $received or "8A" is in $received)[$tt5 have passed for you on this ship, while $t5 have passed on Earth since your launch.<br> With Celestial Streams gone, you see no point in checking for any new messages from Earth.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]] (else:)[$incoming<br> This message was sent from Earth $me_sent5 after launch, and it has reached the ship $t5 after launch. Only $tt5 have passed for you on this ship. <br> (link-replace: "Open message")[(show: ?earth1)] |earth1)[(text-color: "LightPink")[$message]<br> (if: $usekey is "1A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1A)]] |ship1A)[Dangerously, you decide to check out what the world is saying about you. You find an online thread arguing about the ethics of the Scholars Draft. While you’re still close enough to home to send back a message that will be received on a mortal timescale, you decide to chime in.<br> *$USERNAME here. Hi everyone. I’d like to respond to a few points raised in this thread…*<br> [No, I did not know anything about The Mission before opting into the Scholars Draft…]<r1a|<br> [Yes, the Scholars Draft is mandatory…]<r1b|<br> [First of all, yes, the kitchen is amazing…]<r1c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1a)[(replace: ?r1b)[](replace: ?r1c)[](replace:?display)[That’s not really how it works. Tenure contracts include submission into the Scholars Draft. It’s not part of the arithmetic for someone seeking a tenured university position, because the chances of being selected are low and the assignments are usually much shorter than the one I’m on…it’s often seen as a sabbatical in a way. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r1b)[(replace: ?r1a)[](replace: ?r1c)[](replace:?display)[But it has been this way for a very long time. Myself and every tenured professor you’ve encountered in the last twenty years is in the Scholars Draft. It is part of our jobs and we knowingly opt into this draft. I was, of course, initially surprised by the magnitude of this assignment. With that being said, I am happy to fulfill my part of the bargain so that science may continue in the States, and so that we may learn more than we ever have about the Universe.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r1c)[(replace: ?r1b)[](replace: ?r1a)[](replace:?display)[And no, I don’t have to make any of my own food, unless I choose to! I have no idea how they trained robots to cook poached eggs but my word, they did it!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "1B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1B)]] |ship1B)[You scroll down and start reading the page…<br> [The background given for your mission appears to be not quite right…]<r1ba|<br> [Sure, there are some superfluous details included in the text, but the page reads nicely…]<r1bb|<br> [On second thought, you don’t feel like reading it. History always bored you anyway.]<r1bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1ba)[(replace: ?r1bb)[](replace: ?r1bc)[](replace:?display)[To your dismay, there are a few factual errors. For example, you didn’t get to choose to join the Celestial Streams project, you were drafted. And you never actually worked for the Space Force like it claims. You only attended a couple necessary meetings when preparing for your flight.<br> You start to write a response to controls, detailing corrections to the various errors in the text. <br> *Controls, thanks for this exciting news. However, I’m disturbed by a few discrepancies between reality and what is in text. As you well know, I was selected randomly from the Scholars Draft, and again, as you well know, I was working as a university professor. I can see that the rendition of events you’ve provided is much more cheerful than what actually occurred, and maybe that is exactly why you changed it, but still, I find the article lacking in integrity. The public deserves to understand the implications of the Scholars Draft.*<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r1bb)[(replace: ?r1ba)[](replace: ?r1bc)[](replace:?display)[For example, even though you didn’t choose the Celestial Streams project as such, you willingly included your name in the Scholars Draft. It was how you landed your dream job, after all. Sure, typical Scholars Draft projects were shorter in duration and less dangerous in temperance…but nonetheless, you committed your life to scholarly productivity, and the Scholars Draft is necessary for academia to thrive. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r1bc)[(replace: ?r1bb)[](replace: ?r1ba)[](replace:?display)[You go play racquetball instead. Woohoo!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "1C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1C)]] |ship1C)[Would you like to send a quote?<br> [Yes]<r1ca|<br> [No]<r1cb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1ca)[(replace: ?r1cb)[](replace:?display)[(set: $COIN to (prompt: "Send your quote here", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r1cb)[(replace: ?r1ca)[](replace:?display)[You go play racquetball instead. Woohoo!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship2A)]] |ship2A)[ [That's neat, Celestial Streams!]<r2a|<br> [*Grumble grumble*]<r2b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2a)[(replace: ?r2b)[](replace:?display)[You’ve always dreamed of making a splash in the academic world, and now, thanks to Celestial Streams, you have! You smile, knowing it was all worth it.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r2b)[(replace: ?r2a)[](replace:?display)[Wow, thanks. That makes up for being forced on a ship against my will. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship2B)]] |ship2B)[Pilot monitoring feed…?<br> You spin slowly in your chair, eyeing every crevice and shadow in the ship’s cabin. If there’s a camera, you don’t see one. Your heart drops in your stomach when you think back to picking your nose in the pilot seat only hours ago. The ship is huge and you’re totally alone, and yet you’re overcome with sudden claustrophobia. I wonder where else there are cameras…You look to the video camera attached to the cabin’s main computer system and your heart rate rises.<br> [Tape over the camera.]<r2ba|<br> [Don't tape over the camera]<r2bb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2ba)[(replace: ?r2bb)[](replace:?display)[You’re no longer certain if this is the only camera, but you hope it is. Besides, it’s not your problem if Space Truthers believe what you’re doing or not.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r2bb)[(replace: ?r2ba)[](replace:?display)[You decide you’ll just leave the room the next time you want to pick your nose. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship2C)]] |ship2C)[For security? Whose security? Surely they can’t mean my own. For better or for worse, you feel untouchable in the empty blackness of space. You know that even if you do respond, the article will have been published long ago.<br> [Irked, you read the article...]<r2ca|<br> [You read the article and, to your surprise, enjoy it quite a lot.]<r2cb|<br> [Don’t bother opening the article.]<r2cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2ca)[(replace: ?r2cb)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You notice the “few details changed”. You can’t help but feel the need to correct it…<br> You turn on the video recorder in the main cabin. Your frustration is visible in the way you hold your face in your hands, rubbing at your temples and cheeks. <br> “Controls, that’s great that Astronomy is doing an article or whatever, but it isn’t right. I understand that ultimately everything is for the image of Celestial Streams….and my autonomy is not really a factor in the publicity. But to claim that I said “*I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the acco*m*modations provided by Celestial Streams!*” is such obvious bullshit I have to say something…what is the point of lying to people about my happiness?”<br> You could go on, but you know it won’t matter to Celestial Streams. Your only hope is that it lands on sympathetic ears at Mission Controls.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r2cb)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You especially enjoy the lengthy discussion of your academic accolades. You feel pride reading through the list, knowing that your journey on the Astral Kite is a final homage to a cherished career. You stand up and look out the large cabin windows into darkness marked with distant stars. As you stare out, your pride gives way to a sort of emptiness. You think back to your fabricated quote in the article, “I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the accommodations provided by Celestial Streams!”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r2cc)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cb)[](replace:?display)[If it helps whoever feel more secure for whatever reason on Earth, then so be it. You’re out here now. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3A)]] |ship3A)[You feel conflicted upon reading this message...<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more funding for research…]<r3a|<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more power over university funding…]<r3b|<br> [Academic Corporations like Celestial Streams are gaining too much power over US science…]<r3c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r3a)[(replace: ?r3b)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means furthering humanity’s knowledge of space. This goal has been a constant in your life, something that’s provided you ambition, determination, and wonder. It’s nice that you can inspire others to pursue the same path as you, even if there is risk to the Scholars Draft. While it is in some ways a shame that academia can no longer exist without the Scholars Draft, you see it as a necessity. The world has been driven to profitization, and there was no way around that. Better for research to exist as it does now than not at all.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r3b)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means more Scholars Drafts. In fact, if Celestial Streams gets more funding, then they could construct further missions like yours, or other long-term and dangerous missions on Earth. You feel queasy at the idea of inspiring young students to follow in your footsteps. Your mission was the first of this duration and hazard — most draft assignments were typically 1-2 years, and in another country other than one’s own, at most. If Celestial Streams gets more funding, will more people be subjected to spending the rest of their lives, alone, on a spaceship?<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r3c)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3b)[](replace:?display)[More funding to Celestial Streams and other Academic Corporations means that their monopoly over U.S. science funding will only grow. The number of Scholars Draftees could increase with more funding to create more Scholar Drafts programs, making tenured positions more and more precarious, leading to a shut-out of academic culture entirely. The more people who fear the draft, the less scholars, the more likely scholars are to be selected, and the cycle will continue until there are no longer any scholars left. It’s almost like this was purposefully devised, but you can’t be certain. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3B)]] |ship3B)[You lean back in your seat as you finish reading this message. Your physical body feels okay. The workout room is substantial and there’s not much else to do anyway. There’s even a rock wall installed. As far as feelings go…you struggle to find the appropriate descriptors. It’s been a little while since you’ve been asked to express your emotions to someone else. *Maybe I should get into journaling…*you swivel in your chair and look out the windows into space. It looks so empty, and of course it is exceptionally so, with the majority of the Universe being comprised of, well, nothing. It’s funny to think of how abundant your own planet seems within the empty Universe. Brimming with life, all the colors of the rainbow, all the emotions of humanity and the strife of man wrapped up into something that weighs ~ 300,000x less than the lighter Main Sequence stars you’ve seen on your journey thus far. And yet, even in abundance, surrounded by green, blue, light, water, wind…there is a universality to the human desire for there to be something more than just our planet. *I suppose that’s what I’m doing out here.*<br> You turn back around to the computer screen and scroll to see the survey selections:<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of loneliness: (dropdown: bind $loneliness, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br> On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of impending doom: (dropdown: bind $doom, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br>] *Damn, okay then…*<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a weekly basis, how often do you think about opening the airlock and just ending it all?]<br> You sigh and close out of the tab. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3C")[ (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4A)]] |ship4A)[You wonder for a moment who, or what organization, challenged the Scholars Draft. Maybe they will attempt to get in touch with you someday. You feel entertained by the thought of someone new reaching out. Something to add some excitement to your little world, growing smaller every day.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4B)]] |ship4B)[You click through the endless messages of smiling stick figures and beaming stars. <br> <img src="renders/astralkite-alien.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> <img src="renders/astralkite-spaceman.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> You decide to send a drawing of your own and a message back to the “kids”. You do the math and realize that by the time this message arrives, they’ll be approximately (print: (round: $di*2*100)/100) years older. Woof. You get out the art supplies stocked by Mission Controls and find the optical paints supplied by Controls and do your best to think of something to cheery to say…you know, for the kids or whatever. <br> To finish off your letter, you add a drawing. <br> You draw:<br> (dropdown: bind $drawing, "a star", "an astronaut", "an alien")<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4C)]] |ship4C)[(set: $music to (prompt: "What is your favorite genre of music?", "")) (set: $food to (prompt: "What is your favorite food?", "")) (set: $regrets to (prompt: "And, lastly, do you have any regrets about embarking on this voyage?", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: (else-if: $usekey is "5A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship5A)]] |ship5A)[[Hi controls, I don’t feel comfortable with that...]<r5a|<br> [Of course, I’d be happy to.]<r5b|<br> [Send back a recording of you playing John Lennon's "Imagine"]<r5c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5a)[(replace: ?r5b)[](replace: ?r5c)[](replace:?display)["You haven’t explained what the “activism” entails…and what serenity of oneness that outer space has imbued you with. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is flights?!//]<r5ba|<br> [That’s wonderful. I’d like to send a gift to SpaceZ, for naming a ship of theirs after me.]<r5bb|<br> [Walk away.]<r5bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ba)[(replace: ?r5bb)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[*A company like SpaceZ can’t just use my name like that without permission…right? I don’t WANT to be associated with the commercialization of space, I don’t want to be the face of massive CO2 dumps…is this even legal?* Then again, what legal protections do you have (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home anyway? What legal protections can you grant the Earth from so far away?<br> You send back a message to Celestial Streams, “I don’t approve of this. I don’t approve of you using my face and name for this work. None of this was my choice you just put me here and now I have to be your political pawn too?”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r5bb)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[Select the gift you’d like to send:<br> (dropdown: bind $gift2spacez, "A mosaic of the space-sky, as seen from the hull of the spacecraft. ", "A picture of the spectroscopic image of the solar system, as viewed from the spacecraft.", "a picture of yourself to use on the SpaceZ website") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r5bc)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bb)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Space commercialization? Giant rockets injecting the atmosphere with a bunch of crazy shit? It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship5C)]] |ship5C)[Would you like to respond to this message?<br> [Yes]<r5ca|<br> [No]<r5cb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ca)[(replace: ?r5cb)[](replace:?display)[ [What the hell? I didn’t sign up for this.]<r5caa|<br> [This is insane. I have to say something.]<r5cab|<br> [Huh, that’s cool I guess. ]<r5cac|<br> (click: ?r5caa)[(replace: ?r5cab)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[//Not that I signed up for any of this…but seriously? A f%^&* missile?//<br> You decide to send a photocopy of your ass along with the text “Fuck your missiles”. There are no repercussions out here.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r5cab)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[You don’t know if the message will be worthwhile to Earth by the time it gets there, but you have to speak out.<br> You turn on video software on the computer and look into the camera. “Citizens of the Earth, hello from (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home. It has come to my attention that our propensity for violence has reached the far stretches of our Solar System — out to the Asteroid Belt. I implore those nations in the Outer Space Treaty to uphold their fellow human to the standards of peace and unity that the Treaty stands for. I am calling for the nations responsible to cease weapons testing on the Asteroid Belt”.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r5cac)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cab)[](replace:?display)[“I’m glad my name lives on in this way…I am proud of our accomplishments, controls.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ]] (click: ?r5cb)[(replace: ?r5ca)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Maybe you’ll find a new book to read. It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6A)]] |ship6A)[[Planting the US flag into a globe? Ew…]<r6a|<br> [Good for them, I guess.]<r6b|<br> [Awesome! I always knew people would build statues of me some day.]<r6c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6a)[(replace: ?r6b)[](replace: ?r6c)[](replace:?display)[I’m not comfortable having my face and name attached to something that looks like it’s claiming US superiority over the world. That’s kind of gross. I know it’ll be a while before this message gets back to you, but please change that statue.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r6c)[(replace: ?r6a)[](replace: ?r6b)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6B")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6B)]] |ship6B)[You go to the video camera application of your Controls Center, but are hesitant to begin recording. *Turn around?* No… *Go back to Earth and pick up a friend for the ride? Or maybe… go back to Earth and stay put?* <br> You do what you usually end up doing before sending a message to whoever they ask you to send a message to, which is stare off into (literal) space. You swivel around in your chair a few times. You remember Dr. $b6_dr from graduate school. $b6_pro1 was your dear friend, back when instantaneous communication was an option for you. And now $b6_pro3 has been launched into space, just like you. You can’t help but feel simultaneously abandoned and like you’re abandoning Dr. $b6_dr, like it’s your fault been $b6_pro3 was extricated from society and plunged into isolation. <br> *Why’d they put us here on our own anyway? How the fuck does that make any sense?* <br> You look back into your mind to the days you were training for the mission. Or, at least you try. Pacing the halls of the ship and spending your days staring into blackness has done strange things to your memories. The lights in the ship go on and off with your circadian rhythm, specially measured to your personal waking/sleeping cycle, but without the roll of the sun in the sky, the changing lights quickly lost their potency. You remember less and less of your days spent training. Sometimes in moments of particular slipperiness you wonder if they happened at all. <br> You can’t help but feel like a show animal, shipped off to space for the humanity to have its yucks. And now it’s happening to your friend too.<br> [Compose yourself and send a message.]<r6ba|<br> [Send a message, who care's if you're a mess?]<r6bb|<br> [Toast your friend.]<r6bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ba)[(replace: ?r6bb)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[ou compose yourself and record a cheery message to your friend, wishing them well. You even manage to include an inside joke from graduate school. Something about a loaf of banana bread. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r6bb)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[You begin to cry as soon as you hit record. “Dr. $b6_dr, I hope the mission treats you well.”, you conclude in the recording. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r6bc)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bb)[](replace:?display)[You grab a glass and your favorite liquor. You hit record, pour, and toast. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6C")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6C)]] |ship6C)[[Not my problem.]<r6ca|<br> [Stir the pot.]<r6cb|<br> [Stand up for the Space Conservationists.]<r6cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ca)[(replace: ?r6cb)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r6cb)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Lately, updates on the how-goings of Earth have felt more and more like a game to you. Why not stir the pot more?<br> Send one of the below messages:<br> (dropdown: bind $stirthepot, "“Actually, Celestial Streams, I think the Outer Space Treaty is bullshit. Bye!”", "“FUCK YOU, space miners!!!! Fuck you and your greed!!!!!!!”", "“Whoever sent this message, I’ll see to it personally that you’re fired immediately.” You can’t really do anything, but the thought of Celestial Streams receiving this message still makes you laugh. What’s the harm in a little prank call to Earth from " + (string: (round: $di*100)/100) + " light years away?") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r6cc)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cb)[](replace:?display)[The Outer Space Treaty of 1967 explicitly prohibited ownership of space objects, which includes mining them for resources. You’re not impressed, but not particularly surprised either. You send back a message.<br> “I stand with the Space Conservationists, who uphold the ideology that space can not be owned by human or entity, but is a thing for us to cherish and appreciate, as the last thing untouched by humanity’s greed. I ask the nations of the world to consider withdrawing from all extraterrestrial mining activities.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6D")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship6D)]] |ship6D)[[Reply]<r6d1|<br> [Don't reply]<r6d2|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6d1)[(replace: ?r6d2)[](replace:?display)[ [Thanks for the update!]<r6d1a|<br> [Who cares?]<r6d1b|<br> []<disp1| (click: ?r6d1a)[(replace: ?r6d1b)[](replace:?display)[I look forward to continuing this mission under the guidance of SpaceZ.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]] (click: ?r6d1b)[(replace: ?r6d1a)[](replace:?display)[Celestial Streams, SpaceZ, it doesn’t matter. I’m done replying to these messages. You’re all too far away for anything I say to make a difference.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]] ] ] (click: ?r6d2)[(replace: ?r6d1)[](replace:?display)[What would be the point? SpaceZ had nothing to do with your mission, and they’re an even more exploitative academic corporation than Celestial Streams is. No, you don’t think it’s worth replying anymore.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "7A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship7A)]] |ship7A)[[Send no reply.]<r7a|<br> [“Comms, I mean Alex I suppose…”]<r7b|<br> [Turn off the communications equipment.]<r7c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r7a)[(replace: ?r7b)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music3]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot3]]]]] (click: ?r7b)[(replace: ?r7a)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[“Where are you? What’s going on? Why would they cut Celestial Streams funding?”<br> You send the message and check the monitor.
