--!> (for: each _temp, ...$m12)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m12 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m123)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m123 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m12345)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m12345 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m2345)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m2345 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m3456)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m3456 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m456)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m456 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m567)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m567 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m678)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m678 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m789)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m789 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (for: each _temp, ...$m89)[(if: $usekey is _temp)[(set: $m89 to it - (a:$usekey))]] (set: $message to $allmessage's $usekey) <!-- /* TO DO: Check about messages that prevent future messages (e.g. 6D) and remove future keys as needed! */ --!> <!-- /* TO DO: CHECK IF 4B WORKED WITH IMAGES FROM INSPIRED KIDS! */ --!> (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { (if: "6D" is in $received or "8A" is in $received)[$tt7 have passed for you on this ship, while $t7 have passed on Earth since your launch.<br> With Celestial Streams gone, you see no point in checking for any new messages from Earth.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]] (else:)[$incoming<br> This message was sent from Earth $me_sent7 after launch, and it has reached the ship $t7 after launch. Only $tt7 have passed for you on this ship. <br> (link-replace: "Open message")[(show: ?earth1)] |earth1)[(text-color: "LightPink")[$message]<br> (if: $usekey is "1A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1A)]] |ship1A)[Dangerously, you decide to check out what the world is saying about you. You find an online thread arguing about the ethics of the Scholars Draft. While you’re still close enough to home to send back a message that will be received on a mortal timescale, you decide to chime in.<br> *$USERNAME here. Hi everyone. I’d like to respond to a few points raised in this thread…*<br> [No, I did not know anything about The Mission before opting into the Scholars Draft…]<r1a|<br> [Yes, the Scholars Draft is mandatory…]<r1b|<br> [First of all, yes, the kitchen is amazing…]<r1c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1a)[(replace: ?r1b)[](replace: ?r1c)[](replace:?display)[That’s not really how it works. Tenure contracts include submission into the Scholars Draft. It’s not part of the arithmetic for someone seeking a tenured university position, because the chances of being selected are low and the assignments are usually much shorter than the one I’m on…it’s often seen as a sabbatical in a way. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r1b)[(replace: ?r1a)[](replace: ?r1c)[](replace:?display)[But it has been this way for a very long time. Myself and every tenured professor you’ve encountered in the last twenty years is in the Scholars Draft. It is part of our jobs and we knowingly opt into this draft. I was, of course, initially surprised by the magnitude of this assignment. With that being said, I am happy to fulfill my part of the bargain so that science may continue in the States, and so that we may learn more than we ever have about the Universe.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r1c)[(replace: ?r1b)[](replace: ?r1a)[](replace:?display)[And no, I don’t have to make any of my own food, unless I choose to! I have no idea how they trained robots to cook poached eggs but my word, they did it!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "1B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1B)]] |ship1B)[You scroll down and start reading the page…<br> [The background given for your mission appears to be not quite right…]<r1ba|<br> [Sure, there are some superfluous details included in the text, but the page reads nicely…]<r1bb|<br> [On second thought, you don’t feel like reading it. History always bored you anyway.]<r1bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1ba)[(replace: ?r1bb)[](replace: ?r1bc)[](replace:?display)[To your dismay, there are a few factual errors. For example, you didn’t get to choose to join the Celestial Streams project, you were drafted. And you never actually worked for the Space Force like it claims. You only attended a couple necessary meetings when preparing for your flight.<br> You start to write a response to controls, detailing corrections to the various errors in the text. <br> *Controls, thanks for this exciting news. However, I’m disturbed by a few discrepancies between reality and what is in text. As you well know, I was selected randomly from the Scholars Draft, and again, as you well know, I was working as a university professor. I can see that the rendition of events you’ve provided is much more cheerful than what actually occurred, and maybe that is exactly why you changed it, but still, I find the article lacking in integrity. The public deserves to understand the implications of the Scholars Draft.*<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r1bb)[(replace: ?r1ba)[](replace: ?r1bc)[](replace:?display)[For example, even though you didn’t choose the Celestial Streams project as such, you willingly included your name in the Scholars Draft. It was how you landed your dream job, after all. Sure, typical Scholars Draft projects were shorter in duration and less dangerous in temperance…but nonetheless, you committed your life to scholarly productivity, and the Scholars Draft is necessary for academia to thrive. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r1bc)[(replace: ?r1bb)[](replace: ?r1ba)[](replace:?display)[You go play racquetball instead. Woohoo!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "1C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship1C)]] |ship1C)[Would you like to send a quote?<br> [Yes]<r1ca|<br> [No]<r1cb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r1ca)[(replace: ?r1cb)[](replace:?display)[(set: $COIN to (prompt: "Send your quote here", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r1cb)[(replace: ?r1ca)[](replace:?display)[You go play racquetball instead. Woohoo!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship2A)]] |ship2A)[ [That's neat, Celestial Streams!]<r2a|<br> [*Grumble grumble*]<r2b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2a)[(replace: ?r2b)[](replace:?display)[You’ve always dreamed of making a splash in the academic world, and now, thanks to Celestial Streams, you have! You smile, knowing it was all worth it.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r2b)[(replace: ?r2a)[](replace:?display)[Wow, thanks. That makes up for being forced on a ship against my will. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship2B)]] |ship2B)[Pilot monitoring feed…?<br> You spin slowly in your chair, eyeing every crevice and shadow in the ship’s cabin. If there’s a camera, you don’t see one. Your heart drops in your stomach when you think back to picking your nose in the pilot seat only hours ago. The ship is huge and you’re totally alone, and yet you’re overcome with sudden claustrophobia. I wonder where else there are cameras…You look to the video camera attached to the cabin’s main computer system and your heart rate rises.<br> [Tape over the camera.]<r2ba|<br> [Don't tape over the camera]<r2bb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2ba)[(replace: ?r2bb)[](replace:?display)[You’re no longer certain if this is the only camera, but you hope it is. Besides, it’s not your problem if Space Truthers believe what you’re doing or not.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r2bb)[(replace: ?r2ba)[](replace:?display)[You decide you’ll just leave the room the next time you want to pick your nose. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "2C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship2C)]] |ship2C)[For security? Whose security? Surely they can’t mean my own. For better or for worse, you feel untouchable in the empty blackness of space. You know that even if you do respond, the article will have been published long ago.<br> [Irked, you read the article...]<r2ca|<br> [You read the article and, to your surprise, enjoy it quite a lot.]<r2cb|<br> [Don’t bother opening the article.]<r2cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r2ca)[(replace: ?r2cb)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You notice the “few details changed”. You can’t help but feel the need to correct it…<br> You turn on the video recorder in the main cabin. Your frustration is visible in the way you hold your face in your hands, rubbing at your temples and cheeks. <br> “Controls, that’s great that Astronomy is doing an article or whatever, but it isn’t right. I understand that ultimately everything is for the image of Celestial Streams….and my autonomy is not really a factor in the publicity. But to claim that I said “*I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the acco*m*modations provided by Celestial Streams!*” is such obvious bullshit I have to say something…what is the point of lying to people about my happiness?”<br> You could go on, but you know it won’t matter to Celestial Streams. Your only hope is that it lands on sympathetic ears at Mission Controls.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r2cb)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cc)[](replace:?display)[You especially enjoy the lengthy discussion of your academic accolades. You feel pride reading through the list, knowing that your journey on the Astral Kite is a final homage to a cherished career. You stand up and look out the large cabin windows into darkness marked with distant stars. As you stare out, your pride gives way to a sort of emptiness. You think back to your fabricated quote in the article, “I’m happier now than I’ve ever been thanks to the accommodations provided by Celestial Streams!”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r2cc)[(replace: ?r2ca)[](replace: ?r2cb)[](replace:?display)[If it helps whoever feel more secure for whatever reason on Earth, then so be it. You’re out here now. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3A)]] |ship3A)[You feel conflicted upon reading this message...<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more funding for research…]<r3a|<br> [Funding for Celestial Streams means more power over university funding…]<r3b|<br> [Academic Corporations like Celestial Streams are gaining too much power over US science…]<r3c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r3a)[(replace: ?r3b)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means furthering humanity’s knowledge of space. This goal has been a constant in your life, something that’s provided you ambition, determination, and wonder. It’s nice that you can inspire others to pursue the same path as you, even if there is risk to the Scholars Draft. While it is in some ways a shame that academia can no longer exist without the Scholars Draft, you see it as a necessity. The world has been driven to profitization, and there was no way around that. Better for research to exist as it does now than not at all.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r3b)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3c)[](replace:?display)[Which means more Scholars Drafts. In fact, if Celestial Streams gets more funding, then they could construct further missions like yours, or other long-term and dangerous missions on Earth. You feel queasy at the idea of inspiring young students to follow in your footsteps. Your mission was the first of this duration and hazard — most draft assignments were typically 1-2 years, and in another country other than one’s own, at most. If Celestial Streams gets more funding, will more people be subjected to spending the rest of their lives, alone, on a spaceship?<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r3c)[(replace: ?r3a)[](replace: ?r3b)[](replace:?display)[More funding to Celestial Streams and other Academic Corporations means that their monopoly over U.S. science funding will only grow. The number of Scholars Draftees could increase with more funding to create more Scholar Drafts programs, making tenured positions more and more precarious, leading to a shut-out of academic culture entirely. The more people who fear the draft, the less scholars, the more likely scholars are to be selected, and the cycle will continue until there are no longer any scholars left. It’s almost like this was purposefully devised, but you can’t be certain. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship3B)]] |ship3B)[You lean back in your seat as you finish reading this message. Your physical body feels okay. The workout room is substantial and there’s not much else to do anyway. There’s even a rock wall installed. As far as feelings go…you struggle to find the appropriate descriptors. It’s been a little while since you’ve been asked to express your emotions to someone else. *Maybe I should get into journaling…*you swivel in your chair and look out the windows into space. It looks so empty, and of course it is exceptionally so, with the majority of the Universe being comprised of, well, nothing. It’s funny to think of how abundant your own planet seems within the empty Universe. Brimming with life, all the colors of the rainbow, all the emotions of humanity and the strife of man wrapped up into something that weighs ~ 300,000x less than the lighter Main Sequence stars you’ve seen on your journey thus far. And yet, even in abundance, surrounded by green, blue, light, water, wind…there is a universality to the human desire for there to be something more than just our planet. *I suppose that’s what I’m doing out here.*<br> You turn back around to the computer screen and scroll to see the survey selections:<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of loneliness: (dropdown: bind $loneliness, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br> On a scale of 1-5, rate your feelings of impending doom: (dropdown: bind $doom, "1", "2", "3", "4", "5")<br>] *Damn, okay then…*<br> (text-color: "LightPink")[On a weekly basis, how often do you think about opening the airlock and just ending it all?]<br> You sigh and close out of the tab. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "3C")[ (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4A)]] |ship4A)[You wonder for a moment who, or what organization, challenged the Scholars Draft. Maybe they will attempt to get in touch with you someday. You feel entertained by the thought of someone new reaching out. Something to add some excitement to your little world, growing smaller every day.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4B)]] |ship4B)[You click through the endless messages of smiling stick figures and beaming stars. <br> <img src="renders/astralkite-alien.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> <img src="renders/astralkite-spaceman.jpeg" style="width:50%;" /> You decide to send a drawing of your own and a message back to the “kids”. You do the math and realize that by the time this message arrives, they’ll be approximately (print: (round: $di*2*100)/100) years older. Woof. You get out the art supplies stocked by Mission Controls and find the optical paints supplied by Controls and do your best to think of something to cheery to say…you know, for the kids or whatever. <br> To finish off your letter, you add a drawing. <br> You draw:<br> (dropdown: bind $drawing, "a star", "an astronaut", "an alien")<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "4C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship4C)]] |ship4C)[(set: $music to (prompt: "What is your favorite genre of music?", "")) (set: $food to (prompt: "What is your favorite food?", "")) (set: $regrets to (prompt: "And, lastly, do you have any regrets about embarking on this voyage?", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship5A)]] |ship5A)[[Hi controls, I don’t feel comfortable with that...]<r5a|<br> [Of course, I’d be happy to.]<r5b|<br> [Send back a recording of you playing John Lennon's "Imagine"]<r5c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5a)[(replace: ?r5b)[](replace: ?r5c)[](replace:?display)["You haven’t explained what the “activism” entails…and what exactly do you mean by “anti-American”?”"<br> You wish you could ask someone other than Celestial Streams.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5b)[(replace: ?r5a)[](replace: ?r5c)[](replace:?display)[You take a short video espousing the serenity of oneness that outer space has imbued you with. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5c)[(replace: ?r5a)[](replace: ?r5b)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5B")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship5B)]] |ship5B)[[//Over one thousand space flights?!//]<r5ba|<br> [That’s wonderful. I’d like to send a gift to SpaceZ, for naming a ship of theirs after me.]<r5bb|<br> [Walk away.]<r5bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ba)[(replace: ?r5bb)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[*A company like SpaceZ can’t just use my name like that without permission…right? I don’t WANT to be associated with the commercialization of space, I don’t want to be the face of massive CO2 dumps…is this even legal?* Then again, what legal protections do you have (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home anyway? What legal protections can you grant the Earth from so far away?<br> You send back a message to Celestial Streams, “I don’t approve of this. I don’t approve of you using my face and name for this work. None of this was my choice you just put me here and now I have to be your political pawn too?”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5bb)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bc)[](replace:?display)[Select the gift you’d like to send:<br> (dropdown: bind $gift2spacez, "A mosaic of the space-sky, as seen from the hull of the spacecraft. ", "A picture of the spectroscopic image of the solar system, as viewed from the spacecraft.", "a picture of yourself to use on the SpaceZ website") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5bc)[(replace: ?r5ba)[](replace: ?r5bb)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Space commercialization? Giant rockets injecting the atmosphere with a bunch of crazy shit? It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "5C")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship5C)]] |ship5C)[Would you like to respond to this message?<br> [Yes]<r5ca|<br> [No]<r5cb|<br> []<display| (click: ?r5ca)[(replace: ?r5cb)[](replace:?display)[ [What the hell? I didn’t sign up for this.]<r5caa|<br> [This is insane. I have to say something.]<r5cab|<br> [Huh, that’s cool I guess. ]<r5cac|<br> (click: ?r5caa)[(replace: ?r5cab)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[//Not that I signed up for any of this…but seriously? A f%^&* missile?//<br> You decide to send a photocopy of your ass along with the text “Fuck your missiles”. There are no repercussions out here.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5cab)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cac)[](replace:?display)[You don’t know if the message will be worthwhile to Earth by the time it gets there, but you have to speak out.<br> You turn on video software on the computer and look into the camera. “Citizens of the Earth, hello from (print: (round: $di*100)/100) light years from home. It has come to my attention that our propensity for violence has reached the far stretches of our Solar System — out to the Asteroid Belt. I implore those nations in the Outer Space Treaty to uphold their fellow human to the standards of peace and unity that the Treaty stands for. I am calling for the nations responsible to cease weapons testing on the Asteroid Belt”.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r5cac)[(replace: ?r5caa)[](replace: ?r5cab)[](replace:?display)[“I’m glad my name lives on in this way…I am proud of our accomplishments, controls.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ]] (click: ?r5cb)[(replace: ?r5ca)[](replace:?display)[You turn away from the computer, get up, and walk away. You’re heading for the library. Maybe you’ll find a new book to read. It’s not your problem anymore.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6A")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6A)]] |ship6A)[[Planting the US flag into a globe? Ew…]<r6a|<br> [Good for them, I guess.]<r6b|<br> [Awesome! I always knew people would build statues of me some day.]<r6c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6a)[(replace: ?r6b)[](replace: ?r6c)[](replace:?display)[I’m not comfortable having my face and name attached to something that looks like it’s claiming US superiority over the world. That’s kind of gross. I know it’ll be a while before this message gets back to you, but please change that statue.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6b)[(replace: ?r6a)[](replace: ?r6c)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6c)[(replace: ?r6a)[](replace: ?r6b)[](replace:?display)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6B")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6B)]] |ship6B)[You go to the video camera application of your Controls Center, but are hesitant to begin recording. *Turn around?* No… *Go back to Earth and pick up a friend for the ride? Or maybe… go back to Earth and stay put?* <br> You do what you usually end up doing before sending a message to whoever they ask you to send a message to, which is stare off into (literal) space. You swivel around in your chair a few times. You remember Dr. $b6_dr from graduate school. $b6_pro1 was your dear friend, back when instantaneous communication was an option for you. And now $b6_pro3 has been launched into space, just like you. You can’t help but feel simultaneously abandoned and like you’re abandoning Dr. $b6_dr, like it’s your fault been $b6_pro3 was extricated from society and plunged into isolation. <br> *Why’d they put us here on our own anyway? How the fuck does that make any sense?* <br> You look back into your mind to the days you were training for the mission. Or, at least you try. Pacing the halls of the ship and spending your days staring into blackness has done strange things to your memories. The lights in the ship go on and off with your circadian rhythm, specially measured to your personal waking/sleeping cycle, but without the roll of the sun in the sky, the changing lights quickly lost their potency. You remember less and less of your days spent training. Sometimes in moments of particular slipperiness you wonder if they happened at all. <br> You can’t help but feel like a show animal, shipped off to space for the humanity to have its yucks. And now it’s happening to your friend too.<br> [Compose yourself and send a message.]<r6ba|<br> [Send a message, who care's if you're a mess?]<r6bb|<br> [Toast your friend.]<r6bc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ba)[(replace: ?r6bb)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[ou compose yourself and record a cheery message to your friend, wishing them well. You even manage to include an inside joke from graduate school. Something about a loaf of banana bread. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6bb)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bc)[](replace:?display)[You begin to cry as soon as you hit record. “Dr. $b6_dr, I hope the mission treats you well.”, you conclude in the recording. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6bc)[(replace: ?r6ba)[](replace: ?r6bb)[](replace:?display)[You grab a glass and your favorite liquor. You hit record, pour, and toast. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6C")[ (link-replace: "Reply")[(show: ?ship6C)]] |ship6C)[[Not my problem.]<r6ca|<br> [Stir the pot.]<r6cb|<br> [Stand up for the Space Conservationists.]<r6cc|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6ca)[(replace: ?r6cb)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6cb)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cc)[](replace:?display)[Lately, updates on the how-goings of Earth have felt more and more like a game to you. Why not stir the pot more?<br> Send one of the below messages:<br> (dropdown: bind $stirthepot, "“Actually, Celestial Streams, I think the Outer Space Treaty is bullshit. Bye!”", "“FUCK YOU, space miners!!!! Fuck you and your greed!!!!!!!”", "“Whoever sent this message, I’ll see to it personally that you’re fired immediately.” You can’t really do anything, but the thought of Celestial Streams receiving this message still makes you laugh. What’s the harm in a little prank call to Earth from " + (string: (round: $di*100)/100) + " light years away?") (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r6cc)[(replace: ?r6ca)[](replace: ?r6cb)[](replace:?display)[The Outer Space Treaty of 1967 explicitly prohibited ownership of space objects, which includes mining them for resources. You’re not impressed, but not particularly surprised either. You send back a message.<br> “I stand with the Space Conservationists, who uphold the ideology that space can not be owned by human or entity, but is a thing for us to cherish and appreciate, as the last thing untouched by humanity’s greed. I ask the nations of the world to consider withdrawing from all extraterrestrial mining activities.”<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "6D")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship6D)]] |ship6D)[[Reply]<r6d1|<br> [Don't reply]<r6d2|<br> []<display| (click: ?r6d1)[(replace: ?r6d2)[](replace:?display)[ [Thanks for the update!]<r6d1a|<br> [Who cares?]<r6d1b|<br> []<disp1| (click: ?r6d1a)[(replace: ?r6d1b)[](replace:?display)[I look forward to continuing this mission under the guidance of SpaceZ.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]] (click: ?r6d1b)[(replace: ?r6d1a)[](replace:?display)[Celestial Streams, SpaceZ, it doesn’t matter. I’m done replying to these messages. You’re all too far away for anything I say to make a difference.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]] ] ] (click: ?r6d2)[(replace: ?r6d1)[](replace:?display)[What would be the point? SpaceZ had nothing to do with your mission, and they’re an even more exploitative academic corporation than Celestial Streams is. No, you don’t think it’s worth replying anymore.]<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "7A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship7A)]] |ship7A)[[Send no reply.]<r7a|<br> [“Comms, I mean Alex I suppose…”]<r7b|<br> [Turn off the communications equipment.]<r7c|<br> []<display| (click: ?r7a)[(replace: ?r7b)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[Well, that’s not really my problem anymore. You shrug and frown to yourself, then go back to puttering around the ship.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r7b)[(replace: ?r7a)[](replace: ?r7c)[](replace:?display)[“Where are you? What’s going on? Why would they cut Celestial Streams funding?”<br> You send the message and check the monitor. (print: (round: $di*100)/100) years until message is received.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r7c)[(replace: ?r7a)[](replace: ?r7b)[](replace:?display)[You cut the monitor off. You’d rather not hear from comms anyway. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "7B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship7B)]] |ship7B)[Changing landscape? What the hell is that supposed to mean? You wished now more than ever you were an astronaut on the ISS peering down at the Earth rather than out deep, deep in space. If Mission Controls is moving inland, then do they mean the coast is changing? Is the tide rising, swallowing the coasts like climate scientists had predicted years ago? You feel a pang in your heart for the warming Earth. Maybe there was just a storm…or an earthquake…maybe everything is okay. You feel helpless, so you step away from the monitor and try and find something else to do. <br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]] (else-if: $usekey is "8A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship8A)]] |ship8A)[(if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "8B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship8B)]] |ship8B)[There’s a picture of the iota-sized creature included with the message. You admit to yourself it’s kind of cute.<br> Do you reply with a name suggestion?<br> [Yes]<r8a|<br> [No]<r8b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r8a)[(replace: ?r8b)[](replace:?display)[(set: $alienname to (prompt: "Submit alien name here:", ""))<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] (click: ?r8b)[(replace: ?r8a)[](replace:?display)[Heartless!<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "9A")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship9A)]] |ship9A)[You want to ask Jacqueline what will happen to you if Celestial Streams and the Scholars Draft goes totally dark, but you already know the answer.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]] ] (else-if: $usekey is "9B")[ (link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?ship9B)]] |ship9B)[You can’t take it anymore. You can’t imagine — how many? Tens? Hundreds? Thousands? — of students, of people, traveling from the Earth to the Moon and then…go where? Out here? Into nothingness? No. You can’t stand it. It takes a few days of the angriest stewing you’ve done since being on the ship — in the hull, in the hangers, pressed against the doors of the airlock with your eyes wide, in the libraries and workout rooms and entertainment rooms, until finally you make the decision, to beg the scientists awaiting their own Astral Kites to stop while they still can. Time isn’t on your side — who knows, maybe they’ve already sent out the first cohort? There’s matchboxes in the kitchen, you put one in your pocket. You find the reserve of flammable fuel in the deepest parts of the ship, lug a container back to the controls room, the room where you’ve spent the last (print: (round: $ttyri*100)/100). You turn on the camera and start a live recording. This is your last chance for protest.<br> [Yes]<r9a|<br> [No]<r9b|<br> []<display| (click: ?r9a)[(replace: ?r9b)[](replace:?display)[You pour the fuel over yourself and light a match.<br> [[Continue->Credits]]]] (click: ?r9b)[(replace: ?r9a)[](replace:?display)[You put the fuel and the matches away. You wish the next cohort all the best.<br> (if: $putter1 is "coffee")[[[Continue->Coffee4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "broadcast")[[[Continue->Broadcast4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "social")[[[Continue->Social4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "ennui")[[[Continue->Ennui4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "jog")[[[Continue->Jog4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "weights")[[[Continue->Weights4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "horror")[[[Continue->Horror4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "art")[[[Continue->Art4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "music")[[[Continue->Music4]]] (else-if: $putter1 is "chatbot")[[[Continue->Chatbot4]]]]] ] ] ] } </div</div><div class="coffee-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(set: $ttyri to $ttyr8) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { (if: $coffee4 is "4A1")[{(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'coffee', 'loop', true) (track: 'coffee', 'playwhenpossible')} $tt8 have passed for you on the ship.<br> You have spent ages digging through storage, walking the corridors of the ship, looking for coffee beans to use in your cezve. Although you’re yet to find any beans, you’ve identified myriad half-hidden portals, secret hatches in the floor, and small doors that lead to crawl spaces. These days, you spend all your time mapping out the veritable maze of passages you never knew existed. It seems like it’s been a lifetime since you last had coffee, and not for the first time, you rue the day you decided to question where the beans came from. You’ve long since given up hope that you’ll ever drink coffee again, but at least your caffeine addiction led to you exploring the fascinating structure of the ship. It’s given you something interesting to fill your time. One day, you pass through a crawl space to find a small door you’ve never seen before. Like many others throughout the ship, the door is etched with a small label. This one says, “Garden”.<br> [Open the door.]<p1|<br> [Maybe it’s best you leave it alone.]<p2|<br> []<disp1| (click: ?p1)[(replace: ?p2)[](replace:?disp1)[The door opens into a humid greenhouse, thriving with vegetation beneath a sea of violet-hued grow lights. Unmistakable at the center of it all is a grove of coffee trees, ripe with small burgundy cherries. A small six-wheeled rover meanders down the line of trees toward you, a robotic arm reaching out to strip the cherries from the branches, dropping them into a bucket mounted on its back. You watch, flabbergasted, as the rover reaches the end of the line, where it pours the bucket of coffee fruits into a small pipe. The robot turns 90 degrees and rolls to the next row, where it begins watering the roots of the trees from a pipe next to its arm. You stand there, watching, for a long time. So, then. That’s where the coffee beans come from.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?p2)[(replace: ?p1)[](replace:?disp1)[You don’t think you were meant to know about this door, let alone any of the others you’ve uncovered. You back away from the door, watching it a moment longer. Part of you wonders whether there’s a real garden behind the door. Whether there’s some kind of high-tech greenhouse, producing fresh coffee beans, even now. In the end, it doesn’t matter. This distraction from your real mission has gone on long enough, and it’s time to put it behind you. Somehow, it’s better this way. It’s freeing, not knowing. Not wanting to know. It feels like there was a madness gripping you, and you’ve finally managed to shrug it off. Your shoulders relax, for the first time in a long time. A small, peaceful smile creeps across your face.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] ] (else-if: $coffee4 is "4A2")[ {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'cycle56-mystery', 'loop', true) (track: 'cycle56-mystery', 'playwhenpossible')} You can’t remember the last day you didn’t spend most of your waking moments inside the walls of the spacecraft. It takes you ages to trace the pipe, doing your best to take apart only the aesthetic coverings on the walls, to avoid damaging anything too important or load-bearing. Your progress may be slow, but your work has still led you down myriad corridors and crawl spaces you never even knew existed. It’s been so long since you’ve had coffee that, some days, you almost forget why you’re doing this. Your pursuit of one pipe through the inner workings of the spaceship is a mission unto itself. You never could’ve predicted the way this mission came to an end, one day. The pipe traveled upward, and so you peeled back a panel in the ceiling, only to be blinded with violet light, and greeted with a faint mist falling on your face and the grinding, whirring sound of robotics.<br> [Run for your life, you don’t know what this is, and you don’t want to know!]<pa|<br> [Look closer...]<pb|<br> []<disp2| (click: ?pa)[(replace: ?pb)[](replace:?disp2)[You quickly replace the panel in the ceiling, before turning and running away, not so much as looking back over your shoulder, until, some time later, you find yourself panting, alone, back in the safety of the cabin. You don’t know what you saw. You wipe the mist from your face. It’s just water, you say to yourself, a prayer more than a statement that came with any certainty. It’s just water. You’re accustomed, now, to a life without coffee. You don’t need to know the source of that strange light, or why you were misted in the face, or what robot lurks at the heart of this strange spacecraft. You don’t need to know.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?pb)[(replace: ?pa)[](replace:?disp2)[You pull your head up through the ceiling and blink a few times against the violet light and the mist. As your vision clears, you see a humid greenhouse, thriving with vegetation beneath a sea of violet-hued grow lights. Unmistakable at the center of it all is a grove of coffee trees, ripe with small burgundy cherries. A small six-wheeled rover meanders down the line of trees toward you, a robotic arm reaching out to strip the cherries from the branches, dropping them into a bucket mounted on its back. You watch, flabbergasted, as the rover approaches you and pours the bucket of coffee fruits into the small pipe you’ve been following for so very long. The robot turns 90 degrees and rolls to the next row, where it begins watering the roots of the trees from a pipe next to its arm. You watch it for a long time. So, then. That’s where the coffee beans come from.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] ] (else:)[{(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'cycle56-action', 'loop', true) (track: 'cycle56-action', 'playwhenpossible')} Despite your best efforts to ignore the question, it has consumed you. Where do the coffee beans come from? You can think of nothing else. You drink nine cups a day. How can the beans still be fresh? Maybe if you can just deprive your senses, you’ll be able to clear your mind. You wrap cloth around your eyes, place headphones in noise-canceling mode over your ears, stuff your nostrils with tissue paper, and lie flat in a bath filled with warm water, resting your head on the edge of the tub. Behind your closed eyelids there is only the image of a perfectly steaming cup of coffee. You drink twelve cups a day. You don’t remember the last time you slept. Sleep comes with dreams, and with dreams come coffee. Even when you’re awake, sometimes you dream. And whenever you dream, you dream of that beautiful, rich, roasted, nutty, fruity aroma. You drink sixteen cups a day. You think something must be wrong with the ship, because it’s started vibrating. After spending half a day looking for the source of the vibrations you realize it’s your own body, not the ship. You drink twenty cups a day. How can there be enough coffee beans for you to drink this much?<br> [Do whatever it takes to find the source of the beans, even if it means tearing this entire spacecraft apart]<pi|<br> [Stop drinking coffee cold turkey]<pii|<br> []<disp3| (click: ?pi)[(replace: ?pii)[](replace:?disp3)[Half using tools you scavenge around the ship, half using your bare hands, you rip the espresso machine off the walls. You identify the pipe that dispenses the coffee beans, and trace it back through walls of the spacecraft. Using hammers and your bloodied knuckles, you rip through the walls and pipes, paying no mind to the function of the spacecraft. You don’t care if you damage the ship. You have to find the beans. Before long, alarms start ringing. You don’t stop. Steam hisses from a broken pipe. The alarms get louder, the lights dim and start flashing red. You hold a flashlight in your mouth so you can still see, and tear another metal panel off the wall. A mechanical warning voice echoes through the ship. (text-color: "LightCoral")[“Critical failure. Critical failure. Critical failure.”] It sounds muffled through the sea of metal piling up behind you. (text-color: "LightCoral")[“Stop. $USERNAME, you need to stop, or the ship is going to be destroyed! You’re going to die out here!”] It doesn’t occur to you until a minute later that this voice sounds nothing like the mechanical ship’s voice. It sounded human. But you’re much too far away for Celestial Streams to be able to talk to you instantaneously. They shouldn’t have any idea what you’re doing right now. Is there someone else on the ship? The coffee bean pipe passes through another wall, next to a heavy steel door with wheel. You grip the wheel, but it won’t turn. You begin bashing the door with your hammer. The voice overhead has passed beyond urgent to a state of panic. (text-color: "LightCoral")[“That’s an airlock! Don’t go through, it isn’t safe! You need to stop, now!”] The hammer breaks before the door does, but that doesn’t stop you. There are more hammers in the cargo hold. The voice overhead is begging with you to stop. Before long, the door is bending beneath your blows. The voice is screaming, now, incoherent. The door finally caves in enough for you to crawl over it, somersaulting into the supposed airlock…<br> Only, it’s not an airlock. It’s a beige room, with gray and black nylon carpet. There’s something familiar about that carpet. On the far side of the room is a water cooler and a small, half-filled trash can, next to a door. Next to the heavy door you broke through is large cabinet, and a a metal pipe with a funnel situated underneath a 10-liter jug full of coffee beans. You found them. You can’t believe it. You found the coffee beans! You open the cabinet door, to find half a dozen shelves stocked with bags and bags of coffee beans. You turn and storm for the door. Before you reach it, it swings open, and several figures step through, wearing the blue polos of Mission Controls.<br> You can’t believe it. You remember, now, where you’ve seen the carpet before: in the Celestial Streams headquarters, before your launch. Your launch, which was faked. You never left Earth at all. They must have hydraulics to shake the cabin during launch, and everything you saw outside your spacecraft viewport must have been simulated. All the messages they sent you—was any of it real? Did any of those things on Earth even happen? You were never anything more than a prop for them, a publicity stunt for Celestial Streams and the exploitative practices of the Scholars Draft. The polo-clad people from Mission Controls are talking, trying to console you. Some of them are still lying, pretending like they were on the ship with you this whole time. And if you’d just go back through that door, everything will be okay. But all the fresh coffee they gave you—it never made sense. You followed the beans, and now you know the truth.<br> [Fight them]<px|<br> [Break down and cry]<py|<br> []<dispz| (click: ?px)[(replace: ?py)[](replace:?dispz)[Rage pools within you, and you lunge at the nearest Mission Controls operative. The next ten minutes are a blur. You find yourself standing outside, next to the guardhouse in front of Mission Controls HQ. Your hands are bloodier than you remember. You drop the gun you’re holding (you don’t remember when you grabbed it, or from whom) next to the groaning heap of two guards on the ground. You steal the keys off the belt of one of the guards, find their car in the neighboring lot, and drive. You know Celestial Streams will be sending officials after you. Will they send police? Armed forces? You don’t know. And you don’t know how long you have. You pass by digital billboards that advertise the Scholars Draft, showing your face in the cabin of the Astral Kite. You drive into the city center, leaving the car parked with the keys inside, in front of a towering building—the headquarters of a large newspaper. You hear someone shouting that you can’t just leave your car in the road. As you walk through the front doors, the shouting is replaced by glares and whispers of shocked recognition. You smile. You’re going to bring Celestial Streams down. And you might bring the whole Scholars Draft down with them.<br> [[The End->Credits]]]] (click: ?py)[(replace: ?px)[](replace:?dispz)[You collapse to the carpeted floor and you cry, and you cry. The folks from Mission Controls keep consoling you. Over the next few hours, they make a deal with you. If you go back in the ship and see out your mission, they will allow some visits from your friends and family, as long as everyone involved signs NDAs. Seeing no other option, you agree. Your next next days back in the “spacecraft” are a blur. Your journey was strange and lonely, before. But now you know it’s a farce, your day-to-day life feels so meaningless. You have your first visit with family members, held in the carpeted break room just outside your “ship,” and you spend the majority of it sobbing, holding them close, ignoring the polo-wearing Mission Controls officers standing on the back wall, watching. At the end of the visit, your best friend hugs you, whispering in your ear that they’ve been in contact with a lawyer, and they’re wearing a wire right now, and to give them a quick nod if you’d like to break your NDA and reveal Celestial Streams’s lies to the public.<br> [Nod]<pp|<br> [Don't nod]<pq|<br> []<dispp| (click: ?pp)[(replace: ?pq)[](replace:?dispp)[You nod. You don’t know what will happen. But maybe the public revelation of the lie behind this journey—and your cruel, lengthy isolation—will be enough to bring Celestial Streams down. Maybe it will even be enough to bring down the Scholars Draft. Then again, Celestial Streams is powerful, so maybe not. But it feels good to try. You have to believe it is possible. And if you can do this, if you can prevent other people from being exploited the way you were… Well, that will mean more to you than being the first person to travel to self.destination. For the first time in a long time, you find yourself smiling.<br> [[The End->Credits]]]] (click: ?pq)[(replace: ?pp)[](replace:?dispp)[You don’t nod. It’s not worth it. You don’t know what will happen. Celestial Streams is so powerful, you don’t think it’s worth the risk. Your life here might be miserable, now, but at least you can periodically see your friends and family. You might not be the first person to travel to self.destination, but this is better than being alone. This is better, you tell yourself, over and over again. This is better.<br> [[The End->Credits]]]] ]] ]] (click: ?pii)[(replace: ?pi)[](replace:?disp3)[{(track: 'cycle56-action', 'pause') (track: 'coffee', 'loop', true) (track: 'coffee', 'playwhenpossible')}For days, the headaches are intense. A hammering at your temples, a pounding behind your eyes in rhythm with your heartbeat. Your body does everything possible to stop you from giving up your addiction. The fluorescent lights in the spaceship hallways are lasers boring holes into your brain. You curl up in the cabin, taking some ibuprofen and squeezing your eyes shut. You remember very little of the first few days. By the fourth day, the pain has begun to recede. By the end of the week, you’ve recovered fully. Your thoughts have slowed, and, to be honest, you’re no longer worried at all about the coffee beans. They don’t matter, especially not now that you’ve stopped drinking coffee. For the first time in ages, it feels like you can breathe.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] ] } </div></div><div class="broadcast-section"><div class="text-overlay"> {(track: 'cycle14', 'pause') (track: 'cycle56-mystery', 'loop', true) (track: 'cycle56-mystery', 'playwhenpossible') (set: $ttreceive to $ttyr8 + $d8/$gamma) (set: $treceive to $tyr8 + $d8) (set: $ttyri to $ttyr8) (if: $ttyri+$age >130)[(go-to: "Dead")] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >100)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 10)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >90)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 4)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >80)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 5)) (if: $alive < 3)[(go-to: "Dead")]] (else-if:$ttyri+$age >70)[(set: $alive to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $alive < 2)[(go-to: "Dead")]] } { $tt8 have passed for you on the ship.<br> (if: $broadcast4 is "4A")[It has taken you a long time. You’ve made myriad mistakes along the way, and at times, you’ve come close to giving up, setting the project aside for a while before picking it back up again. But now, at last, you’ve done it.<br> You’ve taken the equipment part, learned the ins and outs of every last screw, every last transistor and capacitor and resistor.<br> And the truth is inescapable. Celestial Streams lied to you.<br> Your messages are *not* being sent. They never were.<br> Of course, now you know the truth, you also know enough to be able to *fix* the equipment. You know how to modify it to make it actually send your signal; you think you even know how to aim it properly toward Earth.<br> Of course, that means you have to ask yourself…do you want to broadcast a message to Earth?<br> [Absolutely! That’s what this whole thing has been about!]<pA1|<br> [Who cares? You still won’t ever receive a reply]<pA2|<br> []<dispA| (click: ?pA1)[(replace: ?pA2)[](replace:?dispA)[It doesn’t take you long to fix; you’re an expert in this work, after all. And now that it’s fixed, you can spend the rest of your journey sending all the messages to Earth you like. All that’s left to decide is what to send first…<br> You are sending this message at a distance of (print: (round: $d8*100)/100) light years from Earth. When Earth receives the message, you will have experienced (print: (round: $ttreceive*100)/100) years since launch, while (print: (round: $treceive8*100)/100) years will have passed on Earth.<br> [$broadcast1]<paa|<br> (if: $broadcast2 is not "")[[$broadcast2]<pab|<br>] [Celestial Streams lied!]<pac|<br> [Broadcast a new message]<pad|<br> []<dispaa| (click: ?paa)[(replace: ?pab)[](replace: ?pac)[](replace: ?pad)[](replace:?dispaa)[Excellent choice. You got it right the first time round.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?pab)[(replace: ?paa)[](replace: ?pac)[](replace: ?pad)[](replace:?dispaa)[Where better to start than with what you tried to send in the past?<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?pac)[(replace: ?paa)[](replace: ?pab)[](replace: ?pad)[](replace:?dispaa)[The world must know the truth. And they will know. Thanks to your perseverance, they will know.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?pad)[(replace: ?paa)[](replace: ?pab)[](replace: ?pac)[](replace:?dispaa)[(link-replace: "Continue")[(show: ?p4)] |p4)[(set: $broadcast4 to (prompt: "Enter your message here:", ""))<br>] [[Continue->Arrival]]]]] ] (click: ?pA2)[(replace: ?pA1)[](replace:?dispA)[Actually sending a message to Earth has never been what this was really about, for you. No, that desire has long gone. This has been about learning the truth, and you’ve found that. The truth is, Celestial Streams saw you as little more than a hamster, to be given a fascinating wheel to spin while they send you as far away as possible for their own benefit. Nothing you do or say will ever change that.<br> You could try to send something to Earth, revealing what Celestial Streams has done, but for all you know, there *is* no Celestial Streams anymore. By the time any message you send now arrives, (print: (round: $treceive8*100)/100) years would have passed on Earth. Whether for the better or the worse, you have no idea, but things are likely very different from the home you remember.<br> It’s enough for you to know this truth. You don’t need to shout your victory into the Universe. It’s yours, and there’s nothing Celestial Streams can do to take it away from you.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] ] (else-if: $broadcast4 is "4B")[Sometimes, you still wonder about whether or not the messages you’ve sent to Earth are going through. But it’s not worth risking hurting the ship or your own health to answer that question. You don’t need to know that badly, right?<br> [No, I don't.]<pB1|<br> [Maybe I do, after all…]<pB2|<br> []<dispB| (click: ?pB1)[(replace: ?pB2)[](replace:?dispB)[No, you really don’t. You’ve come to terms with the fact that it won’t make a difference. Knowing one way or the other will change nothing for you. And nothing you ever broadcast would have mattered for Earth, either. You’re far too far removed to ever hope for your words to carry meaning, to maintain enough context to have an impact.<br> It’s alright. You don’t need that. You never have.<br> [[Continue->Arrival]]]] (click: ?pB2)[(replace: ?pB1)[](replace:?dispB)[You thought you were over it, but you’re not. You need to know!
